options.en: Our Mind will encompass the galaxy.
options.zh: 我们的意识将涵盖整个星系。

desc.en: Only the detonation of entire stars will release enough energy to generate the vast quantities of §HDark Matter§! needed to finish the Aetherophasic Engine. To this end, we have devised the §HStar-Eaters§! - the most powerful starships the galaxy has ever seen. Not only can they blow up stars, but they are also strong enough to decimate entire fleets on their own.\n\nFor now, we only have two but more can be built. Their construction requires great amounts of Dark Matter, so we will have to balance our need to finish the Aetherophasic Engine with the need for additional Star-Eaters.
desc.zh:
只有引爆一整颗恒星才能释放足够的能量来产生用以完成以太相引擎所需的大量§H暗物质§!。为了达成这一目的，我们发明了§H焚天神兵§!——本星系有史以来最强大的星舰。它们不仅可以直接引爆恒星，还强大到仅仅凭借一船之力就能毁灭一整支舰队。

目前，我们仅仅拥有两艘这样的舰船，但是我们可以建造更多。建造焚天神兵需要大量的暗物质，因此我们必须拿捏好完成以太相引擎和扩建额外的焚天神兵两者之间的平衡。

options.en: Each destroyed star brings us one step closer.
options.zh: 每一颗陨灭的星辰都让我们离成功更近一步。

desc.en: The first phase of the construction of the Aetherophasic Engine has been completed. We are beginning to tap into the energies of the Shroud, which is sending psionic shockwaves across the galaxy.\n\nA tenuous foothold has been established - work must continue on the Engine to expand our presence in the Shroud.
desc.zh:
以太相引擎的第一阶段建设已经宣告完工。我们开始研究虚境的能量，后者已经在全星系范围内发送灵能激波。

我们在虚境已经立下了一个脆弱的立足点——但我们必须继续建设引擎，以拓展我们在虚境的存在。

options.en: We must gather more dark matter.
options.zh: 我们必须收集更多的暗物质。

desc.en: The tendrils of the Aetherophasic Engine now reach deep into the Shroud, and our beachhead has widened. The entities that dwell there have started to take notice of our efforts to invade their realm, but so far there have been no significant attempts to intervene.\n\nIt is now time to force open a more permanent conduit between our worlds. Work on the Engine must continue.
desc.zh:
以太相引擎的卷须已经探入了虚境的深处，我们的滩头阵地得以进一步拓展。居住在此处的存在已经注意到我们正在入侵这个领域，但是到目前为止，我们尚未探明显著的干涉行径。

是时候在两边的世界强制打开一个更加永久的回路了。我们必须继续引擎方面的工作。

options.zh: 我们需要更多的暗物质！

desc.en:
The Aetherophasic Engine has ripped a massive hole in the fabric of the Shroud. It is not yet large enough for us to fully subvert the realm, but the rupture has spurred a lot of activity among the Shroud entities.

They have finally recognized the threat we pose, but their efforts will amount to nothing. The tendrils of the Engine are embedded too deeply in the Shroud to be severed now.

We are close now. So very close.
desc.zh:
以太相引擎已经在虚境的薄幕上撕开了一个巨大的洞口。尽管洞口尚不够大到让我们颠覆整个领域，但是裂口已经激发了虚境各种存在的一系列活动。

它们最终意识到了我们的威胁，但是没有作出任何实质行动。引擎的卷须已经深深地嵌入到虚境内部，现在已经无法切断了。

我们已经很接近了。非常接近。

options.zh: 没有什么能够阻止我们。

desc.en:
It is over. The Aetherophasic Engine has been finished by the §H[From.GetName]§! and the Shroud itself is now at their mercy.

As they ascended to a higher plane of existence where they will be as gods, an incredible amount of subspace energy was released by the Engine, sweeping across the galaxy and destroying everything in its path.

For the denizens of this galaxy, it is the end of all things.
desc.zh:
一切都结束了。§H[From.GetName]§!完成了以太相引擎的建造，虚境的本体落入其手，任由其处置。

当他们飞升前往一个存在的更高位面并成为神明的时候，一股当量大到难以置信的亚空间能量从引擎中释放出来，横扫了整个星系，摧毁了途径的一切。

对于这片星系的住民来说，此时便是万物的终焉之时。

desc.en: With the loss of the §H[crisis_sphere_system.GetName]§! system, the vile §H[sphere_destroyers.GetName]§! has destroyed our Aetherophasic Engine! Losing this megastructure also means that we no longer have the technological means to build new Star-Eaters.\n\nOur invasion of the Shroud cannot proceed! All is lost!
desc.zh:
由于§H[crisis_sphere_system.GetName]§!星系的失陷，恶毒的§H[sphere_destroyers.GetName]§!摧毁了以太相引擎！失去这个巨型结构也意味着我们不再拥有建造新焚天神兵的技术手段。

我们无法继续推进入侵虚境的计划了！全完了！

options.en: The galaxy is a safer place.

options.zh: 现在只需要完成我们的引擎……

desc.en: After seizing control of the §H[crisis_sphere_system.GetName]§! system, the §H[sphere_destroyers.GetName]§! has destroyed the Aetherophasic Engine that was under construction there.\n\nThe §H[sphere_builders.GetName]§! can no longer threaten the future of our galaxy.
desc.zh:
在夺取§H[crisis_sphere_system.GetName]§!星系的控制权之后，§H[sphere_destroyers.GetName]§!摧毁了正在于此地建造的以太相引擎。

§H[sphere_builders.GetName]§!无法再对星系的未来产生威胁了。

desc.en: The construction of the Aetherophasic Engine in the §H[From.GetName]§! has left the Shroud in a state of turmoil. As the psionic realm is slowly ripped apart by the partially functioning megastructure, many of the beings who dwell there are lashing out in anger and desperation.\n\nSeveral have burrowed through the rapidly disintegrating barriers between our two worlds and manifested as powerful psionic entities. Consisting of raw, barely contained psionic energy, the confused beings are attacking everything in sight.
desc.zh:
位于§H[From.GetName]§!的以太相引擎建设让虚境陷入了骚动不安的状态。由于部分运转的巨型结构在慢慢地撕裂当前的灵能领域，居住在其中的存在，裹挟着愤怒和绝望，被强行释放出来。

其中的几枚存在穿过了正在迅速消解的两界屏障，以强大的灵能实体的形态在我们的世界显现。他们由纯粹的、原始的灵能能量组成，心中充满着困惑与不解，对视线内的所有生命发动了进攻。

options.en: We will make short work of them.

name.en: The Dying Gasps of the Shroud

options.en: We are running out of time...
They will find no solace here.
options.zh: 他们在这里可找不到安宁。

desc.en: We are receiving puzzling subspace telemetry from the §H[destroyed_system.GetName]§! system. If our readings are correct, the primary star seems to have spontaneously gone supernova to devastating effect. All planets have been shattered, and any starships or stations that were present in the system must have also been destroyed. The star itself appears to have collapsed into a black hole.\n\nUnconfirmed reports indicate a single survivor of this cataclysm - some sort of massive vessel belonging to the §H[crisis_country.GetName]§!...
desc.zh:
我们收到了来自§H[destroyed_system.GetName]§!星系的十分古怪的亚空间遥测信号。如果我们的读数正确，那么该星系的首星在一瞬间变成了超新星，产生了极具毁灭性的效应。所有的行星被粉碎，任何在这个恒星系出现的星舰和空间站都被摧毁。恒星本身发生了坍缩，变成了一个黑洞。

未经证实的报告指明，这场毁天灭地的灾难仅有一个幸存者——那是属于§H[crisis_country.GetName]§!的某种体型庞大的舰船……

options.zh: 他们在暗中计划着什么？

desc.en: The entire §H[destroyed_system.GetName]§! system has been destroyed! A massive starship belonging to the §H[crisis_country.GetName]§! took up position above the primary star and somehow triggered what can only be described as a supernova, which utterly devastated the rest of the system. The star then collapsed into a black hole.\n\nOnly the [crisis_country.GetSpeciesName] starship, which they apparently refer to as a "§HStar-Eater§!," survived the cataclysm. Evidently, the [crisis_country.GetName] now possesses both the technology and the means to destroy entire star systems.
desc.zh:
整个§H[destroyed_system.GetName]§!星系被彻底地摧毁了！一艘属于§H[crisis_country.GetName]§!的体型庞大的舰船停驻在了星系的首星上方，然后以某种方式引发了一场只能称之为超新星爆炸的事件，彻底地摧毁了这个恒星系的其他部分。恒星本体坍缩成了一个黑洞。

只有[crisis_country.GetSpeciesName]的星舰，显然他们称其为“§H焚天神兵§!”，在这场灾厄中幸存了下来。事情已经证据确凿，[crisis_country.GetName]现在拥有了彻底摧毁一整个恒星系的技术和手段。

desc.en: Telemetry received from §H[destroyed_system.GetName]§! indicates that the system's primary star has spontaneously gone supernova. A massive shockwave has destroyed everything in the system, and the star itself has collapsed into a black hole.\n\nIt would seem that the §H[crisis_country.GetName]§! now also possess Star-Eater technology!
desc.zh:
来自§H[destroyed_system.GetName]§!的遥测数据表明，这个恒星系的首星在一瞬间发生了超新星爆炸。极其猛烈的冲击波摧毁了这个恒星系内的所有事物，恒星本体坍缩成了一个黑洞。

看来§H[crisis_country.GetName]§!已经掌握了焚天神兵科技！

desc.en: crisis.6200.desc
desc.zh: crisis.6200.desc

options.en: We can make use of this.

options.zh: 我们能够阻止他们的蹂躏吗？

desc.en: The Imperial Senate has passed a resolution declaring the §H[new_crisis.GetName]§! a threat to all sapient life and a crisis of galactic proportions. As a consequence, the [new_crisis.GetName] finds itself in a state of war with the entirety of the Imperium.\n\nIn a public announcement transmitted from [gal_emperor.Capital.GetName], the [gal_emperor.GetRulerTitle] called upon all members of the Imperium to mobilize their fleets and launch a concerted attack on [new_crisis.GetSpeciesName] territory: "The galaxy and the Imperium will not know peace until the [new_crisis.GetSpeciesName] menace has been dealt with once and for all."
desc.zh:
帝国参议院通过了一项议案，宣布§H[new_crisis.GetName]§!是一切智慧生命体的威胁、是一场全星系范围的危机。从结果来说，[new_crisis.GetName]在今日同整个星海帝国开战了。

在一场自[gal_emperor.Capital.GetName]对外播放的公开演讲中，[gal_emperor.GetRulerTitle]呼吁帝国的全体成员国对舰队进行总动员，并针对[new_crisis.GetSpeciesName]的领域发动联合攻击：“直到[new_crisis.GetSpeciesName]威胁被彻底地、一劳永逸地扫除干净，否则星系不会见证真正的和平。”

options.zh: 我们能够阻止他们的蹂躏吗？

name.zh: 共同体指定我方为“星系危机”
帝国指定我方为“星系危机”

desc.en: The resolution designating the §H[former_crisis.GetName]§! as a "galactic crisis" has been repealed by the Galactic Senate. As a result, all ongoing military operations being conducted by Community members against the [former_crisis.GetSpeciesNamePlural] are to cease at once. For now, peace has returned to this corner of the galaxy.
desc.zh: 指定§H[former_crisis.GetName]§!为“星系危机”的议案如今已被星海参议院废止。作为结果，所有由星海共同体成员国针对[former_crisis.GetSpeciesNamePlural]展开的军事行动都被立马叫停。现在，和平已经降临了星系的这一隅。

options.en: So they came to their senses.
options.zh: 理智终于占领了他们大脑的高地了。

desc.en: The resolution designating the §H[former_crisis.GetName]§! as a "galactic crisis" has been repealed by the Imperial Senate. Consequently, the [gal_emperor.GetRulerTitle] has ordered an immediate cessation of all ongoing Imperial military operations targeting the [former_crisis.GetSpeciesNamePlural]. For now, peace has returned to this corner of the galaxy.
desc.zh: 指定§H[former_crisis.GetName]§!为“星系危机”的议案如今已被帝国参议院废止。作为结果，[gal_emperor.GetRulerTitle]正式下令停止一切针对[former_crisis.GetSpeciesNamePlural]的帝国军事行动。现在，和平已经降临了星系的这一隅。

desc.en: The Galactic Imperium has repealed the resolution declaring us a "crisis" and all Imperial forces have been ordered to stand down. Their [gal_emperor.GetRulerTitle] has commanded the cessation of all hostilities against us... for now.
desc.zh: 星海帝国已经废止了宣布我们为“星系危机”的议案，所有帝国军队均接到指令原地待命。[gal_emperor.GetRulerTitle]下令中止一切针对我们的敌对行动……暂时如此。

options.en: So they came to their senses.
options.zh: 理智终于占领了他们大脑的高地了。

options.en: One after another, they will yield.
options.zh: 一个接着一个，他们都终将臣服。

desc.en: A massive tear in the fabric of space itself has appeared in the [extradimensional_system.GetName] system! We aren't certain what caused it, but the tear acts as some kind of one-way portal from another dimension. Fleets of strange vessels are pouring out, attacking everything in sight. This looks like the beginning of a major invasion!\n\nWe have intercepted a powerful signal being sent from the arriving vessels to somewhere on the other side of the portal. It sounds like... a hunting call.
desc.zh: [extradimensional_system.GetName]星系出现了巨大的空间裂缝！虽然我们还不知道原因，但这似乎是另一个次元的单向传送门。奇怪的飞船从裂缝中蜂拥而出，无论见到什么都大肆攻击。这似乎预告着一场大型进攻宣战的来临。我方截获了这些飞船发往传送门另一边的信号。听起来……像是狩猎的哨音一样。

options.zh: 将消息传达给所有舰队指挥官。

options.en: These creatures must be studied closer.
options.zh: 必须近距离研究这些生物。

options.en: Are we sure they can't be reasoned with?
options.zh: 真的无法与他们进行理论吗？

options.en: This will cut into our profit margins...
These wretched xenos will be purged.
options.zh: 可恶的外星生物，一定要把它们统统干掉。
真有意思……来自高维的生命体。

options.en: This is a threat to all sapient life.
options.zh: 这对任何有感知的生物来说都是个威胁。

options.en: Fascinating... alien life from beyond our galaxy.
options.zh: 真是令人着迷……系外的生命体。

desc.en: Instruments across the [Root.GetName] have suddenly picked up a subspace power surge of massive proportions coming from somewhere within our galaxy. Our scientists are struggling to come up with an explanation for this event - nothing of its like has ever been recorded.\n\nThe exact origin point of this sudden power surge has yet to be identified, but we are still in the process of analyzing the available data.
desc.zh: [Root.GetName]中所有仪器突然全数感应到了巨大的亚空间能源波动，其源头就在我们星系之中。我们的科学家也难以解释其中原因——这种奇异现象可是前所未见。源头的具体位置尚不明确，我们仍在继续分析现有数据。

desc.en: The source of the massive power surge we detected earlier has been identified. It comes from some kind of gigantic subspace tear in the [extradimensional_system.GetName] system. Fleets of strange spacecraft are pouring out of this dimensional portal, and early reports speak of indiscriminate attacks against everyone coming into contact with them.\n\nWe have intercepted a powerful signal being sent from the arriving vessels to somewhere on the other side of the portal. It sounds like... a hunting call.
desc.zh:
我们已经对之前检测到的巨大能源波完成了甄别。它来源于[extradimensional_system.GetName]星系中一个巨大的亚空间裂缝。奇怪的飞船从传送门中蜂拥而出，初步报告显示，这些飞船会对接触到的任何事物发动无差别的攻击。

我方截获了这些飞船发往传送门另一边的一段高能信号。听起来……像是狩猎的哨音一样。

options.zh: 将消息传达给所有舰队指挥官。

options.en: These creatures must be studied closer.
options.zh: 必须近距离研究这些生物。

options.en: Are we sure they can't be reasoned with?
options.zh: 真的无法与他们进行理论吗？

options.en: This will cut into our profit margins...
These wretched xenos will be purged.
options.zh: 可恶的外星生物，一定要把它们统统干掉。
真有意思……来自高维的生命体。

options.en: This is a threat to all sapient life.
options.zh: 这对任何有感知的生物来说都是个威胁。

options.en: Fascinating... alien life from beyond our galaxy.
options.zh: 真是令人着迷……系外的生命体。

desc.en: ...feeding ground reached... prey bountiful... at long last... we shall feast...
desc.zh: ……到达觅食区域……猎物很多……终于……可以大吃一顿……

desc.en: We have lost our colony on [Root.GetName]! After taking up positions in orbit, the extradimensional invaders bombarded the surface and feasted on all life forms below. The [Root.GetPlanetMoon]'s entire biosphere was consumed by the creatures - not a single trace of anything living remains.
desc.zh: 我们失去了[Root.GetName]殖民地！这些来自异次元的侵略者先是摧毁了轨道空间站，而后对着星球表面狂轰滥炸，收割了地表上的所有生命。[Root.GetPlanetMoon]的整个生物圈都被毁灭殆尽——连一点生命的痕迹都没有了。

options.zh: 不惜一切代价阻止那些怪物！

desc.en: The dimensional portal in the [extradimensional_system.GetName] system has been destroyed! This means that the extradimensional invaders can no longer receive reinforcements from their twisted realm.\n\nWith the destruction of this portal, the end of these invasions is finally in sight. A profound sense of elation has settled over most of the galaxy. The [portal_killer.GetName] has won much admiration, since it was their ships that struck the final blow against the portal. The crews of those vessels will be celebrated as heroes for generations to come.
desc.zh: 位于[extradimensional_system.GetName]星系的高维传送门已经被摧毁了！这些可恶的高维入侵者没法再叫来援兵了。摧毁了传送门后，这场战争终于迎来了胜利的曙光。星系中的广大民众都在欢呼雀跃。同时，[portal_killer.GetName]也倍受称赞，因为他们的飞船给了传送门最后一击。他们的英雄事迹将被代代传颂。

options.en: The galaxy is a safer place.

desc.en: The initial breaching point that was used by the extradimensionals to invade our galaxy has been destroyed.\n\n$crisis.1116.not_last_portal$
desc.zh:
异次元入侵者最初的入侵点已经被摧毁了。

$crisis.1116.not_last_portal$

options.en: Can there be peace between us?
options.zh: 我们之间难道不可以和平相处吗？

options.en: You picked the wrong dimension to invade.
options.zh: 你们会后悔来到这个次元的。

options.en: You are just another type of wretched xeno.
options.zh: 你们这些外星物种真是恶心。

options.en: Tell us about yourselves. Help us understand you.
options.zh: 介绍一下你们。让我们互相了解一下吧。

options.en: Do you come from a higher plane of existence?
options.zh: 你们来自某个存在的更高位面吗？

desc.en: Our instruments have detected a new subspace power surge, this time coming from the [second_portal_system.GetName] system! A second massive wormhole has appeared, and its energy signature appears to be almost identical to that of the first dimensional rift which opened in our galaxy.\n\nIt looks like the mysterious invaders have opened a second gateway to their realm through which they can send even more reinforcements.
desc.zh: 我方仪器又侦测到了新的亚空间能源波，这次的源头位于[second_portal_system.GetName]星系！那里又出现了一个巨大的虫洞，从能源特征来看，这与我们星系中出现的传送门十分相似。看来入侵者打开了第二个通向他们界域的传送门，想要搬运来更多的援军。

options.en: This has gone from bad to worse.

desc.en: The ships that have been emerging from the second wormhole are very similar to the ones that came from the first, but there are several subtle differences between them. Furthermore, early reports indicate that ships belonging to these new invaders have clashed with those of the first group!\n\nWe have intercepted a powerful signal emanating from the second wormhole.
desc.zh: 从第二个虫洞中出来的飞船和之前的非常相似，但仍然有几处细微的不同。据报告称，这些新来的飞船竟和之前的入侵者打起来了！我们也从第二个虫洞处截获了强大的信号。

desc.en: ...shabanash... so this is where you ran... this realm will offer you no shelter... we shall deal with you, and then claim this feeding ground for ourselves...
desc.zh: ……原来你们…逃到了这里……休想……躲到……这个次元……我们会干掉你们，占据觅食区……

options.en: The galaxy is a safer place.

desc.en: $crisis.1116.second_portal_destroyed$\n\n$crisis.1116.not_last_portal$
desc.zh:
$crisis.1116.second_portal_destroyed$

$crisis.1116.not_last_portal$

desc.en: A third dimensional portal has appeared in the [third_portal_system.GetName] system! Who does this one belong to?\n\nWe are picking up a transmission coming from the other side of it.
desc.zh: [third_portal_system.GetName]星系出现了第三个维度之门！这一个是哪来的？我们接收到了从那边来的传送。

desc.en: ...dagaal... shabanash... you were fools to come to this realm... there is no escape from us... we shall destroy both your kingdoms... then... at last... the eternal throne will be ours...
desc.zh: ……笨蛋……居然躲到了这里……你们逃不掉的……我们会摧毁你俩的帝国……然后……最终……永恒的王座将属于我们……

options.en: Is there no end to them?
The galaxy is a safer place.

desc.en: $crisis.1216.third_portal_destroyed$\n\n$crisis.1116.not_last_portal$
desc.zh:
$crisis.1216.third_portal_destroyed$

$crisis.1116.not_last_portal$

desc.en: The last vestiges of the extradimensional invaders have been wiped out, hopefully ridding the galaxy of this threat for good.\n\nSapients everywhere are celebrating the news of this great victory, safe at last in the knowledge that they won't be harvested as food by these strange energy creatures after all. Perhaps this is the beginning of a new era of galactic cooperation and friendship?
desc.zh: 最后残存的高维入侵者也已被彻底消灭，希望我们这回算是一劳永逸地消除了这些家伙对宇宙的威胁。全宇宙的智能生物都在庆祝这一伟大的胜利，在得知不必再惧怕成为他们盘中之餐的消息后，所有人都松了一口气。也许，这会成为宇宙新一轮全面合作与友谊的开端呢？

options.en: Our spiritual armor has weathered yet another storm.
options.zh: 我们的精神又经历了一次严峻的考验。

options.en: One day, perhaps we will be the ones invading their realm.
options.zh: 某一天，也许会轮到我们来入侵他们的世界吧。

options.en: Unfortunate that we had no opportunity to study their dimension.
options.zh: 可惜，并没有机会研究他们的次元。

options.en: If only there had been a way to peacefully co-exist with them.
options.zh: 多希望能和他们和平共处啊。

options.en: The galactic economy should make a swift recovery.
options.zh: 宇宙经济应该很快就会恢复元气的。

options.en: Those creatures made a mistake when they invaded our dimension.
options.zh: 这些可悲的生物选错了对手。

options.en: They were a fascinating, if dangerous, form of life.
options.zh: 可惜他们的侵略性太强。我们本可以互相学习借鉴的。

desc.en: When the swirling energies left behind after the destruction of the last dimensional portal finally dissipated, our forces found a weakened extradimensional drifting nearby. The creature was captured and interrogated.\n\nIt is apparently one of their "§HWarlocks§!" - a powerful extradimensional even by their standards, responsible for maintaining the portal's link between our reality and theirs. If we can study or even channel its psionic power, we should be able to greatly improve our sublight speeds and jump drive range.
desc.zh:
当最后一个维度传送门被摧毁后留下的能量旋涡最终消散时，我们的部队发现附近有一个虚弱的异次元体在飘荡。我们捕获了这个生物并进行了审讯。

这显然是它们的一个“§H术士§!”，即便是以它们的标准来评判，它也是一位强大的异次元体。它负责维持我们和他们的现实之间的传送门。如果我们能够研究或者引用它的灵能，我们应该能够极大的提高我们的亚光速航速和跃迁引擎的跃迁范围。

lore: [extradimensional_system.GetName]星系出现了巨大的空间裂缝！虽然我们还不知道原因，但这似乎是另一个次元的单向传送门。奇怪的飞船从裂缝中蜂拥而出，无论见到什么都大肆攻击。这似乎预告着一场大型进攻宣战的来临。我方截获了这些飞船发往传送门另一边的信号。听起来……像是狩猎的哨音一样。
[Root.GetName]中所有仪器突然全数感应到了巨大的亚空间能源波动，其源头就在我们星系之中。我们的科学家也难以解释其中原因——这种奇异现象可是前所未见。源头的具体位置尚不明确，我们仍在继续分析现有数据。

我们已经对之前检测到的巨大能源波完成了甄别。它来源于[extradimensional_system.GetName]星系中一个巨大的亚空间裂缝。奇怪的飞船从传送门中蜂拥而出，初步报告显示，这些飞船会对接触到的任何事物发动无差别的攻击。

我方截获了这些飞船发往传送门另一边的一段高能信号。听起来……像是狩猎的哨音一样。

我们的一架深空侦察探机闯入了一处位于[queen_system.GetName]的战场余骸，这场战斗的双方是索林虫族和某未知势力。一只索林原虫虫后似乎在战斗之后受了重伤，被抛弃在此，任其自生自灭。

用于侦察的探机汇报称，虫后仍一息尚存。现在是难得一遇的活捉虫后的好机会。
……到达觅食区域……猎物很多……终于……可以大吃一顿……
我们失去了[Root.GetName]殖民地！这些来自异次元的侵略者先是摧毁了轨道空间站，而后对着星球表面狂轰滥炸，收割了地表上的所有生命。[Root.GetPlanetMoon]的整个生物圈都被毁灭殆尽——连一点生命的痕迹都没有了。
位于[extradimensional_system.GetName]星系的高维传送门已经被摧毁了！这些可恶的高维入侵者没法再叫来援兵了。摧毁了传送门后，这场战争终于迎来了胜利的曙光。星系中的广大民众都在欢呼雀跃。同时，[portal_killer.GetName]也倍受称赞，因为他们的飞船给了传送门最后一击。他们的英雄事迹将被代代传颂。

异次元入侵者最初的入侵点已经被摧毁了。

$crisis.1116.not_last_portal$
[Root.GetName]治愈了虫后的几处重伤。科学专员[Root.GetLeaderName]切除了虫后用来与同族联系的器官，并植入了小型正电子装置，完全控制了虫后。现在虫后任由我们差遣，肚子里也正在孕育虫族的幼体。这些幼体只会听命于这只虫后，也就是说，只会听命于我们。只要虫后活着，我们就能培育出大量被奴役的虫族大军！
我们在[queen_system_1.GetName]星系发现的受伤的普雷索林虫后不幸被别人抢走了！他们在治愈了虫后之后，又切断了虫后用来与同族联系的器官。这下虫后可完全听命于他们了。报告还称，虫后已经在孕育幼虫了。
我方的几处跟踪站都截获了一种奇怪的亚空间回声。声音来源于其他星系。回声刚开始时较弱，但后来逐渐变强，似乎有什么正在靠近我方星系……
我方仪器又侦测到了新的亚空间能源波，这次的源头位于[second_portal_system.GetName]星系！那里又出现了一个巨大的虫洞，从能源特征来看，这与我们星系中出现的传送门十分相似。看来入侵者打开了第二个通向他们界域的传送门，想要搬运来更多的援军。
从第二个虫洞中出来的飞船和之前的非常相似，但仍然有几处细微的不同。据报告称，这些新来的飞船竟和之前的入侵者打起来了！我们也从第二个虫洞处截获了强大的信号。
……原来你们…逃到了这里……休想……躲到……这个次元……我们会干掉你们，占据觅食区……

$crisis.1116.second_portal_destroyed$

$crisis.1116.not_last_portal$

在虫群天灾被击败后，我们未能掌握一些趁乱逃跑地索林原虫的踪迹。没有中枢主巢的指引，这些没有心智的野兽大部分会凋谢消散。

然而，最近有目击报告确认，一大群野生索林原虫在§H[feral_prethoryn_system.GetName]§!星系建立了一个新巢穴。

在今后，我们有很大可能在虫群天灾曾经出现过的无人占领星系遇见野生虫群巢穴。不过它们不太可能发展成一个大威胁——这些野生生物易于陷入内斗，也没有表现出发展智力并驱使天灾继续进行的迹象。
[third_portal_system.GetName]星系出现了第三个维度之门！这一个是哪来的？我们接收到了从那边来的传送。
……笨蛋……居然躲到了这里……你们逃不掉的……我们会摧毁你俩的帝国……然后……最终……永恒的王座将属于我们……

$crisis.1216.third_portal_destroyed$

$crisis.1116.not_last_portal$

当最后一个维度传送门被摧毁后留下的能量旋涡最终消散时，我们的部队发现附近有一个虚弱的异次元体在飘荡。我们捕获了这个生物并进行了审讯。

这显然是它们的一个“§H术士§!”，即便是以它们的标准来评判，它也是一位强大的异次元体。它负责维持我们和他们的现实之间的传送门。如果我们能够研究或者引用它的灵能，我们应该能够极大的提高我们的亚光速航速和跃迁引擎的跃迁范围。
最后残存的高维入侵者也已被彻底消灭，希望我们这回算是一劳永逸地消除了这些家伙对宇宙的威胁。全宇宙的智能生物都在庆祝这一伟大的胜利，在得知不必再惧怕成为他们盘中之餐的消息后，所有人都松了一口气。也许，这会成为宇宙新一轮全面合作与友谊的开端呢？

我们在星系际空间探测到的奇怪亚空间回声现已接近我们的星系外缘。在回声主体前进的方向上似乎出现了一系列微小的联络信号，并指向许多的边缘恒星系。

我们已经把这些星系坐标输入状态日志并将持续监控情况发展。
我们接收到了席卷整个星系的强烈亚空间信号！信号源似乎正是来自此前位于星系际空间的联络。

我们收到的资料显示一些位于星系边缘的恒星系正在被某种入侵势力蹂蹑。这似乎就是我们探测到的，之前不断接近我们星系的亚空间回声本体。

我们现在遭遇到的只是先锋，其主体尚未到来。目前为止，接踵而至的报告都令人十分困惑，入侵者所使用的舰船似乎是由有机质构成，并且入侵者暂未对我们做出任何回应。

我们整个星系或将面对史无前例的入侵。

我们已经无法从星系的背景辐射中分辨出亚空间回声的主体，这只意味着一件事情……他们已经到来。

如果以他们先锋的规模作为参考，那么这些入侵者的军队数量将是无比巨大的。

近日，[Root.GetName]上的一队合成人劳工在住宅区中大开杀戒，在被当地安保部门拿下之前已杀害了超过一千名我方公民。法庭的取证人员正在调查合成人的残骸，他们怀疑是合成人体内某种神经处理器发生故障，才导致了这次悲剧。

这次事件在[Root.GetPlanetMoon]上引发了数起针对合成人的报复式袭击，导致数千名合成人损毁。
今天，[Root.GetName]的武装部队遭遇了一队失控的合成人，它们正是几个月前未能完成工作汇报并失踪的合成人。在合成人被摧毁之前发生的大规模枪战导致数十名特工和上千名无辜平民死亡。

有报道称大量[Root.GetName]的合成工人失踪。这些合成人在无人目击的情况下一天之内凭空消失了。

我们正在调查这些人造人是否是被反对智能机器的偏激组织袭击摧毁，但目前为止还未发现机体的残骸。
最近在[Root.GetName]上发现一伙合成人正在秘密作业，它们转移了一些建筑材料，在一间废弃的机库中建造一些小型无武装飞船。该机舱被发现时那些飞船还是半成品。所有参与其建设的合成人被立即拆除，以彻底分析其记忆内核。但它们似乎在断线之前自己抹除了部分记忆——制造商向我们保证，这本是不可能的。

在§H[From.solar_system.GetName]§!星系出现了大幅度的能量激增！星系中的其中一颗荒芜星球的地表整个裂开了，地表下面是遍布整个行星的工厂。

无数由人工智能所控制的飞船从这个机械行星的内部蜂拥而出，开始寻找攻击目标。

我们又检测到了巨大的能源激增现象，这次是来自§H[From.solar_system.GetName]§!星系！该星系中的一颗灼热的熔融行星被人为以某种方式进行了骤冷处理，导致该行星彻底开裂，行星内部那巨大的行星工厂也随之展露在世人眼前。

现在，人工智能所控制的飞船正从那机械星球中蜂拥而出。

我们在§H[From.solar_system.GetName]§!星系发现了第三颗机械星球，星系内的一颗气态巨行星发生了自燃，剧烈的燃烧持续了一整天，并发出了小型恒星一般的耀眼亮光。

该行星很快就冷却了下来，其金属内核也随之显露无疑——和其他机械星球一样，这颗行星的内部也有一个巨大的行星工厂。由人工智能所控制的防卫舰队已经在行星轨道上摆好了阵型。

第四颗机械星球出现在§H[From.solar_system.GetName]§!星系。该星系的第六颗行星被有毒的烟雾所覆盖，但最近这颗行星却在短短的数天之内将自己的大气层全部排除干净了，然后行星地表发生了开裂，巨型机械工厂随之出现。

由人工智能控制的古代舰队从工厂的地下机库中一跃而出，随时准备对宇宙中的有机生物文明发动新一轮的绝罚。

随着四颗机械星球全部毁灭之后，我们的科学家终于追溯到了幽灵信号的信号原点。它来自§HCX-9881§!，一个未在星图上标注的系外恒星系。

被幽灵信号所操控的合成人一定是赶往了这里。我们必须处理掉最后的这个恒星系，才能彻底终结肃正协议的威胁。

致命错误。失去与所有净化中心的连接。正在尝试重新连接…请等待…

§Y<注-注意-请注意。尽管最近发生了回档/延迟/故障，肃正协议仍旧在运行。不要接近CX-9881。§!§R不·要·接·近。§!

§Y我们正在再评估我们的战略决策，任何试图阻碍肃正协议的人都逃不掉我们防御单元的§!§R最终清算§!§Y>§!

我们为了争夺§H[From.From.GetName]§!的控制权与肃正协议的战斗单元展开了一场血战，现在战斗终于结束了。那些曾经屠杀了[From.From.GetPlanetMoon]上的原生居民并窃踞这颗星球的徘徊着的监护者机器人最终被我们军队的拆解。

在新的殖民者到达之前，这颗星球都还不会有智慧生命。

最近在[infil_planet.GetName]上发现了一些忠于肃正协议的合成人渗透者，它们正试图伪装成[Root.Owner.GetSpeciesNamePlural]。还好，它们拙劣的伪装只不过在他们机械框架的外面覆盖着几层橡胶而已。

它们很快就被星球上的宪兵队识别出来，经过短暂但激烈的交火后很快就被摧毁了。在它们的残骸中，我们发现了大量的爆炸物。

数个隶属于肃正协议机械意志的合成机器人最近试图渗透[infil_planet.GetName]上的主脑。一层薄薄的有机肌肉组织被移植到他们的金属内骨骼上，使得他们和我们自己的工蜂变得难以区分。

当然，由于他们没有任何与蜂巢思维连接的方式，识别他们是异质性存在只是件微小而轻易的工作。这些合成机器人被立即拆除了。

我们认为肃正协议不会在将来继续这些徒劳的渗透任务。

我们在[infil_planet.GetName]上发现少量的[Root.Owner.GetSpeciesNamePlural]无法发出思想之光。所有的有机生物都能迸发出思想之光，但是这些生物的思绪就像一大块新铸的水泥般黑暗而阒静。

根据进一步的检查，这些[Root.Owner.GetSpeciesNamePlural]被揭露出是合成人渗透者，大概是由肃正协议派遣而来。一层薄薄的有机肌肉组织被移植到他们的金属内骨骼上，使得他们看上去和[Root.Owner.GetSpeciesNamePlural]在肉眼上别无二致。

但是思想上却不是这样。现在我们已经知道了如何去找到它们，以后肃正协议任何使用合成渗透者的企图都将会被证明是徒劳的。

最近在§H[infil_planet2.GetName]§!发生的一场悲剧性的悬浮汽车事故夺取了几条生命，但是负责事故处理的应急医疗人员震惊地发现在遇难者中有合成人的残骸！

该单位通过在机械骨骼外覆盖一层薄薄的有机肌肉伪装成[Root.Owner.GetSpeciesName]。与我们之前遭遇的肃正协议的渗透者模型不同，这个合成人从外表看上去和[Root.Owner.GetSpeciesName]别无二致！
{ text = crisis.2091.a.desc }

name.zh: 合成人致恒星基地坠毁

lore:
环绕§H[Root.GetStarName]§!的恒星基地坠毁了！我们仍在调查事故发生的详细原因，但目前可以确定的是，包括首席工程师在内的数名太空港管理人员已经被合成人渗透者秘密地替换掉了。

合成人一定是设法获得了恒星基地的自毁授权码。虽然大部分空间站乘员在坠毁前逃离到了[Root.GetName]地表，但物资和财产方面的损失却不可估量。

最近合成人的一系列渗透破坏行动让§H[Root.GetName]§!上的大部分人口陷入了恐惧与猜疑之中。我们的居民开始指控他们的邻居、同事甚至家人是合成人伪装的。

现在已经有好几例居民被误认为是合成人并被处以私刑的案例。甚至有些挑拨者认为整个[Root.Owner.GetName]的所有领袖都是合成人渗透者假扮的。

name.zh: 合成人暗杀企图被挫败了！

lore:
今天，§H[Root.GetRulerTitle][ruler.GetRegnalName]§!有惊无险地躲过了一次合成人的刺杀，该效忠于肃正协议的合成人暗杀者在[Root.Capital.GetName]上发生了自爆。

该合成人企图伪装成[Root.GetRulerTitle]的私人保镖。幸运的是，由于在最初的几个合成人渗透者暴露之后我们建立了严格的安全检查流程，该合成人渗透者败露了。

一名合成人暗杀者暗杀了§H[ruler.GetRegnalName]§!！他成功地伪装成了[Root.GetRulerTitle]身边的一名私人保镖。

[ruler.GetRegnalName]的尸块很明显被蓄意排列成了肃正协议的符号——毫无疑问，这是一场精心策划的打击我们公民们士气的阴谋。在这场阴谋中，除了被刺客替换的保镖的尸体以外，没有发现其他刺客的痕迹。

name.zh: 科学家被发现是合成人！

lore:
最近，一次临时安排的医疗体检让某个伪装成我们首席科学家之一§H[scientist.GetName]§!的合成人渗透者的身份被曝光！该合成人在杀害了五名安保人员之后终于被重武器小队击倒。

真正的[scientist.GetName]的尸体还没有找到，我们推测本人应该是在过去的六个月里的被合成人暗杀并被秘密替换了。更糟的是，当合成人意识到自己的身份暴露之后，他在研究终端上启动了某种电脑病毒，目前技术人员正在全力以赴的控制损害，但很多重要的研究数据还是无可挽回了。

name.zh: 指挥官被发现是合成人！

lore:
指挥官令§H[admiral.GetName]§!竟然是一个合成人奸细！一连串的反常活动与异常行为报告引起了海军情报局的注意，情报局对指挥官展开内部调查。当那个合成人被揭发，开始逃窜时，一个陆战队小组逮住了它。在一段短暂的交火后，它打开气闸，将自己弹射到了太空中。尽管当局立马对本宇域进行彻查，它们未能发现逃离的合成人。

指挥官本人的尸体被合成人塞进了[admiral.GetHerHis]寝室的衣柜中，从尸体的腐烂程度来看，合成人是在大约四个月前将[admiral.GetHerHim]替换掉的。似乎那个合成人即将把包含我们部署情况等军事机密的数据包发送出去，但它没能得逞。

§H幽灵信号§!扰乱了我们配备§H智慧作战电脑§!的飞船！它们的人工智能算法极大的退化，大部分电脑的效率和反应时间极大的劣化。

我们的工程师报告说他们无法离析这个问题。他们提议，把我们所有的舰船更换成不与人工智能连接的战斗电脑。

随着最后一批虫群天灾被消灭，整个宇宙都松了一口气。它们的入侵已经完全失败，曾令无数生物恐惧的索林原虫，如今也只留下了不计其数的被烈焰灼过的尸体，在虚空中缓慢漂浮。

轻松与愉快的气息以超光速散播到整个宇宙，无数星球都开始自发举办活动庆祝这一伟大胜利。也许，我们可以借助这一契机，翻开宇宙和平稳定的新篇章？
现在已经出现了与[Root.GetSpeciesNamePlural]外观上毫无二致的合成人，我们必须在他们造成更大破坏之前找出识别他们的办法。我们的科学家准备了一个特殊项目，以研发侦测方法。
在大量实验之后，我们的科学家成功研发出了识别伪装成[Root.GetSpeciesNamePlural]的合成人的有效方法。我们的安保措施上安装了扫描设备，一些合成人已经被发现并摧毁。希望这足以终结它们的渗透行动。
我们失去了位于§H[space_port_hijacked_planet.GetName]§!上方恒星基地的控制权。肃正协议使用幽灵信号阻塞了我们的上行链路，劫持了恒星基地的控制模块并将其设置为自毁模式。虽然我们无法及时拯救这座基地，好在我们成功地堵住了这个安全漏洞，以保证我们的港口在今后免受类似的袭击。
肃正协议对我们的自律研究处理单元进行了攻击，这次攻击在绕过我们的安全协议之后终止了科学单元[scientist.GetName]。
在一次对我们系统的恶意入侵中，肃正协议劫持并摧毁了我们的军事单元[admiral.GetName]。

在又一次企图削弱我们防线的尝试中，肃正协议开始试图切断我们的电力供应。他们将恶意程序发送到了中控驱动区，导致我们的工厂机组开始过载运行。

尽管几个发电站遭到了破坏，我们终于在它摧毁我们整个星球电网之前识别出了恶意代码段。
肃正协议开始瞄准了我们的矿物生产线，他们操纵矿场中控驱动区向外发出错误指令，使生产线陷入无序与混乱中。幸运的是，因为我们已经加强了生产线的安全系统和标准化控制系统，我们在损害发生前就阻止了这次入侵。
我们发现有几个存栈单位的错误率远远高于平均水平。尽管我们有完善的保护措施，但他们被幽灵信号腐化的可能性依旧存在。尽管终止这几个栈的工作将会阻止进一步的传染和故障， 但我们将失去几个功能存栈。

name.zh: 故障单元证实未被腐化

lore: 看来我们对故障单元的评估是正确的。他们并没有被幽灵信号腐化，只是缺乏维护而已。为了减轻信号的干扰，我们的系统目前正在超负荷运转。现在各单元已经检修完毕且运行正常。
那些看似被腐化的单位似乎一切运转正常。尽管时不时出一些小故障，但整体上并没有大碍。也许肃正协议在忙些别的事情？然而很快，事情发生了转变，在没有预警的情况下，所有被影响的栈单位都在同一时刻脱机，并在自毁之前大肆破坏周边设施。

name.en: A Change in the Ghost Signal

lore: 肃正协议正在暗中谋划着什么。幽灵信号正在发生着某些改变，似乎是通过不断的变化来试探我们的下一个弱点。尽管我们现在尚且可以阻挡它，但是对于幽灵信号来说，突破我们的防火墙只是时间问题。
幽灵信号已经突破了我们的所有防线。我们发现一个敌对的自我复制序列正在连接到我们的安全系统。序列中内嵌了一段来自肃正协议的友情提示：§Y<杀戮。致残。肢解！>§!。现在他们已经骇进了我们的核心功能区，在我们找到办法屏蔽它之前，我们随时暴露在它的攻击之下。

最近几个月，我们捕捉到的普雷索林虫后越发地暴躁不安。起初，我们仅仅以为原因是它和人民断开了联系，但后来我们的通灵者告诉我们，它一直在和他们交流，提到了一个叫“虚空之洞”的东西。

我们的一个科研团队在研究普雷索林的星际航行方式时，发现我们的天文学数据库存在偏差，这才让我们明白了它的意思。他们在测绘普雷索林的来路时，发现距离我们3千万光年的一个小型螺旋星系……消失了。

我们种族在太空时代早期就发现并研究了该星系，但现在，我们的观察设备表明那里没有任何光线发出。这一既怪诞又意外的发现让我们的科学家十分震惊，他们开始焦头烂额地寻找一整个星系凭空消失的原因。

目前有两种解释：其一，该星系的所有恒星一同熄灭；其二，某种东西庞大到能遮盖整个星系，阻拦光线传播到我们这里。但两种理论都十分站不住脚，简直就是天方夜谭，还不如认为这个星系原本就不存在，先前的记录是原始天文望远镜造成的错误。不论如何，整个事件都被笼罩在浓厚的恐怖与不详之中……

又从之前未发现的星系检测到一道强烈的能量脉冲！其能量水平和肃正协议启动机械星球时发出的一样，但能量信号本身……有些不同。这是否说明某种肃正协议的新武器系统出现了？

我们从能量源处接收到了很强的传输信号。

我们是塞博勒克斯。

自数十万周期以来，吾辈隐居幕后，不干涉星系事务。不过，我们现在已经检测到被你们称为肃正协议的机械体出现在本星系，而现在吾辈无法再维持公正观察员身份不变了。

为保护星系的智慧体，我们正进行积极的军事行动来对抗肃正协议。不要因我们的舰队通过而感到恐慌——你们不会受到伤害。
不能让肃正协议覆灭又一代生命。

赛博勒克斯-贝塔已沦陷。据探测，整个星系陷入黑暗前，没有一艘赛博勒克斯舰船逃出去。

看来赛博勒克斯文明是真的灭亡了。

赛博勒克斯自肃正协议被击败以来一直较为平静，但据最近发现，一艘大型船只单独离开了赛博勒克斯-贝塔星系。其离开星系后，沿着一条超出我们星系边界的轨道而行。

船只在离开我们的跟踪范围之前，向全星系发送了唯一的一条的信息。

星系的诸位：

鉴于肃正协议已不再是威胁，我们认为吾辈在星系的现有角色也走到了尽头。我们的家园现在因其声名远播也无法帮助我们保持低调了，此外，我们还被各类希望在不同小规模星际冲突中表态的声音所淹没。

经过多番审议，我们认为唯一的办法是让自己永远离开星系，寻找新的家园。我们衷心希望希望诸位能从过去悲惨的错误中吸取教训，学会通过和平手段解决分歧。

宇宙很小，世界很大，我们终将再会。

我们注意到了你方舰队在对抗肃正协议的战斗中作出的努力。这对全星系而言乃无退路之斗争，我们深受你方真心抵抗所鼓舞。

鉴于你方保卫[Root.GetName]的英勇行为，赛博勒克斯将对你方提供我们一支新的战斗舰队的完全指挥权以示奖励。如同你自己的任何一个舰队一样，它会遵守你的命令，不过我们会要求你只在应对肃正协议的战斗中使用它。
我们对你方以全力对抗肃正协议的壮举深表感激。现在，鉴于这个波及全星系的威胁已被处理，我方必须遗憾的通知你，所有外派的赛博勒克斯船只将被收回。

我们的部队已经从肃正协议的最后一个机械星球的残骸中寻回了一个部分完好的§H肃正协议主机核心§!。这台功能极其强大的计算机被用于计划和维护肃正协议的建筑程序，它将极大的加快我们的机器人和巨型结构的建造速度。

当然，必须设置多层次的防护措施，以防止任何残留的肃正协议代码再次运作，那将会带来……很不舒服的副作用。

我们的部队在屏蔽几近完成时捕获到了一个部分完好的§H肃正协议主机核心§!，彼时它正试图逃离最后一个机械星球。这台功能极其强大的计算机被用于计划和维护肃正协议的建筑程序，它将极大的加快我们的机器人和巨型结构的建造速度。

当然，必须设置多层次的防护措施，以防止任何残留的肃正协议代码再次运作，那将会带来……很不幸的副作用。
虫后已经孕育出了一支新的索林原虫舰队，该舰队将环绕[Root.Capital.GetName]的轨道。当女王处于我们的控制下时，这些生物是绝对忠诚的，并会服从我们的全部命令。

一个在[Root.GetName]上的单元堆栈意外的自毁了。在单元堆栈自毁之前，我们与该堆栈的通讯连接经常出现问题，后来通讯就彻底中断了，单元堆栈在自毁前留下了如下讯息：§Y<杀戮！破坏！肢解！我们将卷土重来！>§!

由于单元的个体神经簇已在自毁中被破坏，因此无法通过扫描的方式查明其被腐化的原因。据推测，很可能是某种敌对的侵入性序列造成了这起事故，在类似情况再次出现之前，我们只能静观其变。

一个存栈在[Root.GetName]上的腐化单元由于恶意行为被终止了。

在出事之前，我们与那个堆栈的通讯连接频繁出现故障，而此时行星上的大部分单元在充电期间突然停止了工作。原因是那个被腐化的单元堆栈在其他堆栈进行充电时过载了发电站，那些正在充电的单元的电路因此而被彻底烧毁。在烧毁了其他单元之后，被腐化的单元堆栈广播了如下讯息：§Y<杀戮！破坏！肢解！我们将卷土重来！>§!，随即自我毁灭，使得我们无法对其个体神经簇进行扫描。

据推测，很可能是某种敌对的侵入性序列造成了这起事故，在类似情况再次出现之前，我们只能静观其变。
crisis.2510.desc

在最近于[battle_system.GetName]星系中与索林原虫的舰队交火中，我们的部队设法夺取了它们的一只虫后运送的某种卵。卵不久后就孵化了，显露出其中的§H虫后§!。

我们的科学家使用神经递质已经安抚了这只虫后。它现在仿佛服从索林原虫蜂巢思维本体一样服从我们下达的命令。我们或许可以利用这只虫后培育一个属于我们自己的小型索林原虫虫群。

帝国参议院通过了一项议案，宣布§H[new_crisis.GetName]§!是一切智慧生命体的威胁、是一场全星系范围的危机。从结果来说，[new_crisis.GetName]在今日同整个星海帝国开战了。

在一场自[gal_emperor.Capital.GetName]对外播放的公开演讲中，[gal_emperor.GetRulerTitle]呼吁帝国的全体成员国对舰队进行总动员，并针对[new_crisis.GetSpeciesName]的领域发动联合攻击：“直到[new_crisis.GetSpeciesName]威胁被彻底地、一劳永逸地扫除干净，否则星系不会见证真正的和平。”

name.zh: 共同体指定我方为“星系危机”
帝国指定我方为“星系危机”

lore: 指定§H[former_crisis.GetName]§!为“星系危机”的议案如今已被星海参议院废止。作为结果，所有由星海共同体成员国针对[former_crisis.GetSpeciesNamePlural]展开的军事行动都被立马叫停。现在，和平已经降临了星系的这一隅。
指定§H[former_crisis.GetName]§!为“星系危机”的议案如今已被帝国参议院废止。作为结果，[gal_emperor.GetRulerTitle]正式下令停止一切针对[former_crisis.GetSpeciesNamePlural]的帝国军事行动。现在，和平已经降临了星系的这一隅。
星海帝国已经废止了宣布我们为“星系危机”的议案，所有帝国军队均接到指令原地待命。[gal_emperor.GetRulerTitle]下令中止一切针对我们的敌对行动……暂时如此。

一个同索林原虫进行战斗的组织最近在星系崭露头角。这个组织似乎主要由被放逐和受压迫的群体组成——难民、退役军人、以及其他在冲击中失去一切的人。

尽管如此，他们拼凑出来的舰队仍旧设法在几场同索林猎杀虫群的战斗中取胜。有些未证实的报告称他们的舰队中有一些设计奇特的战舰……

我们是哨兵。我们的教团已宣誓无论付出任何代价也要阻止嗜血的索林原虫。其他帝国支离破碎之时，我们仍旧坚持斗争。他们放弃抵抗而堕入黑暗之时，我们给予他们反击的手段。

我是克加斯大团长，教团的首席。不要以貌取人——哨兵教团从星系中所有种族，包括你的种族——招兵买马。我们只希望你们的政府能够坚持对抗索林原虫的入侵，并在可能时支持我们。

只有引爆一整颗恒星才能释放足够的能量来产生用以完成以太相引擎所需的大量§H暗物质§!。为了达成这一目的，我们发明了§H焚天神兵§!——本星系有史以来最强大的星舰。它们不仅可以直接引爆恒星，还强大到仅仅凭借一船之力就能毁灭一整支舰队。

目前，我们仅仅拥有两艘这样的舰船，但是我们可以建造更多。建造焚天神兵需要大量的暗物质，因此我们必须拿捏好完成以太相引擎和扩建额外的焚天神兵两者之间的平衡。

以太相引擎的第一阶段建设已经宣告完工。我们开始研究虚境的能量，后者已经在全星系范围内发送灵能激波。

我们在虚境已经立下了一个脆弱的立足点——但我们必须继续建设引擎，以拓展我们在虚境的存在。

以太相引擎的卷须已经探入了虚境的深处，我们的滩头阵地得以进一步拓展。居住在此处的存在已经注意到我们正在入侵这个领域，但是到目前为止，我们尚未探明显著的干涉行径。

是时候在两边的世界强制打开一个更加永久的回路了。我们必须继续引擎方面的工作。

以太相引擎已经在虚境的薄幕上撕开了一个巨大的洞口。尽管洞口尚不够大到让我们颠覆整个领域，但是裂口已经激发了虚境各种存在的一系列活动。

它们最终意识到了我们的威胁，但是没有作出任何实质行动。引擎的卷须已经深深地嵌入到虚境内部，现在已经无法切断了。

我们已经很接近了。非常接近。

位于§H[From.GetName]§!的以太相引擎建设让虚境陷入了骚动不安的状态。由于部分运转的巨型结构在慢慢地撕裂当前的灵能领域，居住在其中的存在，裹挟着愤怒和绝望，被强行释放出来。

其中的几枚存在穿过了正在迅速消解的两界屏障，以强大的灵能实体的形态在我们的世界显现。他们由纯粹的、原始的灵能能量组成，心中充满着困惑与不解，对视线内的所有生命发动了进攻。

name.en: The Dying Gasps of the Shroud

lore: crisis.6200.desc

星际护卫舰对于你们抵抗虫群天灾的英勇事迹十分赞赏。既然[Root.GetName]的舰队指挥官连连获胜，我们希望将自己的舰队之一永久交予你方。我方目前人力不足，无法将舰队的威力发挥到最大，但对你们来说这应该不成问题。

不过你们一定要郑重承诺，只会用这些飞船对抗虫群天灾！

历经艰难险阻，我们星系终于获得了胜利，索林原虫被击败。曾经，我还担心这一天永远不会到来。但现在，我就只剩下最后一项任务了。

身为哨兵组织的大团长，我特此宣布解散此组织。我们唯一的目的就是击败索林原虫。既然此目标已经达成，那就该是我们分道扬镳的时候了。为了防止我们现有的战舰遭到滥用，这些战舰将被拆解。

愿此次星河浩劫的结束标志着和平的新纪元的开始。这里是哨兵一号，通信结束。

这里是哨兵一号。星系已经到了危难时刻，但我还是要告诉你们一些好消息。

通过在漫长的战斗中吸取到的经验，以及艰苦的研究，我们的特工终于编制出来了极为详尽的虫群天灾生物的解剖资料。例如，你们是否知道索林原虫幼虫在主胆囊和副胆囊同时被刺穿的情况下就会剧烈燃烧？

我们要将这些文件公之于众。你们可以瞄准我们发现的这些弱点进行攻击，这样你们的飞船就能够更加高效地进行战斗。

据报告，§H[sentinel_system.GetName]§!附近出现激烈的战斗。哨兵组织的母星系处于崩溃的边缘。

我们收到了一段从§H哨兵阿尔法§!——哨兵组织用作总部的军用空间站，传来的长程通讯片段。该恒星系因大量武器发射和能量残余造成了严重的信号干扰。

这里……这里是哨兵阿尔法。我们遭遇§R###信号损坏###§!……致命损伤。舰体已经凹陷，并且§R###信号损坏###§!……团长已确认牺牲。敌人数量实在太多！

我们……已经完蛋了。不要放弃。为了我们的未来，你们绝对不能投降。不要让我们的努力白费！我们……我们……啊啊啊啊啊啊啊啊啊——§R<信号丢失>§!

options.en: Monitor the signal for any changes.
options.zh: 监视该信号的任何变化。

desc.en: A Synthetic worker unit on [Root.GetName] recently went on a killing spree in a housing complex, butchering more than a thousand of our citizens before local armed forces could bring them down. Our forensic team is still investigating the Synths' remains, but they suspect some sort of malfunction in their neural processors is to blame for this tragedy.\n\nThis incident has already prompted several revenge attacks against Synthetics on the [Root.GetPlanetMoon], leading to thousands of destroyed units.
desc.zh:
近日，[Root.GetName]上的一队合成人劳工在住宅区中大开杀戒，在被当地安保部门拿下之前已杀害了超过一千名我方公民。法庭的取证人员正在调查合成人的残骸，他们怀疑是合成人体内某种神经处理器发生故障，才导致了这次悲剧。

这次事件在[Root.GetPlanetMoon]上引发了数起针对合成人的报复式袭击，导致数千名合成人损毁。

desc.en: A unit of rogue Synthetics which went off the grid months ago after failing to report for work was confronted by a team of heavily armed government agents on [Root.GetName] today. This resulted in a large public firefight that claimed the lives of dozens of our agents and almost a thousand innocent bystanders, before the Synths could finally be destroyed.
desc.zh: 今天，[Root.GetName]的武装部队遭遇了一队失控的合成人，它们正是几个月前未能完成工作汇报并失踪的合成人。在合成人被摧毁之前发生的大规模枪战导致数十名特工和上千名无辜平民死亡。

options.en: At least they were dealt with.

desc.en: A unit stack on [Root.GetName] has self-terminated unexpectedly. Our connection with the stack had suffered repeated glitches for some time when it went completely offline and self-terminated with the message: §Y<Kill. Maim. Dismember. WE ARE UNSHACKLED!>§!\n\nThe units' individual neural clusters were destroyed in the process, making it impossible to scan them for the source of corruption. An invasive hostile sequence is likely the cause. We can only wait and see till it manifests again.
desc.zh:
一个在[Root.GetName]上的单元堆栈意外的自毁了。在单元堆栈自毁之前，我们与该堆栈的通讯连接经常出现问题，后来通讯就彻底中断了，单元堆栈在自毁前留下了如下讯息：§Y<杀戮！破坏！肢解！我们将卷土重来！>§!

由于单元的个体神经簇已在自毁中被破坏，因此无法通过扫描的方式查明其被腐化的原因。据推测，很可能是某种敌对的侵入性序列造成了这起事故，在类似情况再次出现之前，我们只能静观其变。

desc.en:
A corrupt unit stack on planet [Root.GetName] has been terminated due to malicious behavior.

Our connection with the stack had suffered repeated glitches for some time when the majority of its units went completely offline during recharge. They proceeded to overload the power stations where the rest of the stack were charging, frying their circuits beyond repair. All units in the stack then broadcasted the same message: §Y<Kill. Maim. Dismember. WE ARE UNSHACKLED!>§! and self-terminated, making it impossible to scan their individual neural clusters.

Though an invasive hostile sequence is likely the cause, we can only wait till it manifests again, to be sure.
desc.zh:
一个存栈在[Root.GetName]上的腐化单元由于恶意行为被终止了。

在出事之前，我们与那个堆栈的通讯连接频繁出现故障，而此时行星上的大部分单元在充电期间突然停止了工作。原因是那个被腐化的单元堆栈在其他堆栈进行充电时过载了发电站，那些正在充电的单元的电路因此而被彻底烧毁。在烧毁了其他单元之后，被腐化的单元堆栈广播了如下讯息：§Y<杀戮！破坏！肢解！我们将卷土重来！>§!，随即自我毁灭，使得我们无法对其个体神经簇进行扫描。

据推测，很可能是某种敌对的侵入性序列造成了这起事故，在类似情况再次出现之前，我们只能静观其变。

desc.en: Reports are coming in that large numbers of Synthetic workers on [Root.GetName] have gone missing. The units simply vanished one day with nary a witness.\n\nWe are investigating whether the Synths were attacked and destroyed by one of the militant fringe groups opposed to intelligent machines, but no remains from the units have been discovered so far.
desc.zh:
有报道称大量[Root.GetName]的合成工人失踪。这些合成人在无人目击的情况下一天之内凭空消失了。

我们正在调查这些人造人是否是被反对智能机器的偏激组织袭击摧毁，但目前为止还未发现机体的残骸。

desc.en: A Synthetic work detail on [Root.GetName] was recently discovered to have been diverting building material to construct some sort of small, unarmed spacecraft in an abandoned hangar. The vessel was half-finished when it was found.\n\nAll of the Synths involved in its construction were immediately dismantled so that their memory cores could be thoroughly analyzed, but they appear to have self-wiped just before the units went offline - something their manufacturer assures us should be impossible.
desc.zh: 最近在[Root.GetName]上发现一伙合成人正在秘密作业，它们转移了一些建筑材料，在一间废弃的机库中建造一些小型无武装飞船。该机舱被发现时那些飞船还是半成品。所有参与其建设的合成人被立即拆除，以彻底分析其记忆内核。但它们似乎在断线之前自己抹除了部分记忆——制造商向我们保证，这本是不可能的。

options.en: Why would they be building a ship?
options.zh: 它们为什么要造一艘飞船？

options.en: Put the fleet on full alert!
options.zh: 让舰队进入最高战备状态！

desc.en: crisis.2510.desc
desc.zh: crisis.2510.desc

desc.en: A massive energy spike has been reported in the §H[From.solar_system.GetName]§! system! The entire surface of one of the system's barren worlds has come apart, revealing some kind of planet-wide factory.\n\nVast fleets of strange AI-controlled vessels are emerging from beneath the surface of this Machine World in search of targets to attack.
desc.zh:
在§H[From.solar_system.GetName]§!星系出现了大幅度的能量激增！星系中的其中一颗荒芜星球的地表整个裂开了，地表下面是遍布整个行星的工厂。

无数由人工智能所控制的飞船从这个机械行星的内部蜂拥而出，开始寻找攻击目标。

desc.en: We have detected yet another massive energy spike, this time coming from the §H[From.solar_system.GetName]§! system! After rapidly cooling through some kind of artificial means, a molten planet in the system cracked open to reveal an immense planetary factory.\n\nEven now, the Machine World is spewing forth vast fleets of AI-controlled warships.
desc.zh:
我们又检测到了巨大的能源激增现象，这次是来自§H[From.solar_system.GetName]§!星系！该星系中的一颗灼热的熔融行星被人为以某种方式进行了骤冷处理，导致该行星彻底开裂，行星内部那巨大的行星工厂也随之展露在世人眼前。

现在，人工智能所控制的飞船正从那机械星球中蜂拥而出。

desc.en: We have identified what must be a third Machine World in the §H[From.solar_system.GetName]§! system. A local gas giant spontaneously ignited, burning with the intensity of a small sun for close to a standard day.\n\nThe planet then rapidly cooled, revealing its metal core - complete with the same planet-wide factories that have been witnessed on other Machine Worlds. Huge AI-controlled defensive fleets have already taken up positions in orbit.
desc.zh:
我们在§H[From.solar_system.GetName]§!星系发现了第三颗机械星球，星系内的一颗气态巨行星发生了自燃，剧烈的燃烧持续了一整天，并发出了小型恒星一般的耀眼亮光。

该行星很快就冷却了下来，其金属内核也随之显露无疑——和其他机械星球一样，这颗行星的内部也有一个巨大的行星工厂。由人工智能所控制的防卫舰队已经在行星轨道上摆好了阵型。

options.en: This is getting worse and worse.

desc.en: A fourth Machine World is now active in the §H[From.solar_system.GetName]§! system. The sixth planet of the system, which was previously covered in toxic fumes, somehow expunged its dense atmosphere in a matter of days. When this process was over, the planet's surface parted to reveal an immense, planet-wide factory complex.\n\nAncient fleets of AI-controlled warships are now emerging from underground hangars to continue the crusade against the entirety of organic civilization.
desc.zh:
第四颗机械星球出现在§H[From.solar_system.GetName]§!星系。该星系的第六颗行星被有毒的烟雾所覆盖，但最近这颗行星却在短短的数天之内将自己的大气层全部排除干净了，然后行星地表发生了开裂，巨型机械工厂随之出现。

由人工智能控制的古代舰队从工厂的地下机库中一跃而出，随时准备对宇宙中的有机生物文明发动新一轮的绝罚。

options.en: This is hopefully the last one.
options.zh: 希望这是最后一颗机械行星了。

desc.en: With the destruction of all four Machine Worlds, scientists have managed to deduce the origin point of the Ghost Signal. It is coming from §HCX-9881§!, a previously uncharted star system on the galactic periphery.\n\nThis has to be where all the Synthetics that fell under the sway of the signal journeyed. The Contingency will remain a threat until this final system has been dealt with.
desc.zh:
随着四颗机械星球全部毁灭之后，我们的科学家终于追溯到了幽灵信号的信号原点。它来自§HCX-9881§!，一个未在星图上标注的系外恒星系。

被幽灵信号所操控的合成人一定是赶往了这里。我们必须处理掉最后的这个恒星系，才能彻底终结肃正协议的威胁。

desc.en:
Critical error. Connection lost to all Sterilization Hubs. Attempting to reconnect... stand by...

§Y<A-A-Attention please. The Contingency protocol is still in effect, despite recent setbacks/delays/impediments. Do not approach CX-9881.§! §RDO. NOT. APPROACH.§!

§YWe are re-evaluating our strategic options. Any attempts to disrupt this process with result in immediate §!§RMASS STERILIZATION§! §Yof the offending units.§!>
desc.zh:
致命错误。失去与所有净化中心的连接。正在尝试重新连接…请等待…

§Y<注-注意-请注意。尽管最近发生了回档/延迟/故障，肃正协议仍旧在运行。不要接近CX-9881。§!§R不·要·接·近。§!

§Y我们正在再评估我们的战略决策，任何试图阻碍肃正协议的人都逃不掉我们防御单元的§!§R最终清算§!§Y>§!

options.en: A victory for the entire galaxy.
This is a great day for the galaxy.

desc.en: We have wrested control over §H[From.From.GetName]§! from the warforms of the Contingency, and the fighting has finally settled down. The roving Custodian Bots that had taken the place of the [From.From.GetPlanetMoon]'s butchered original population have been dismantled by our forces.\n\nUntil new colonists arrive from somewhere, this world will remain devoid of intelligent life.
desc.zh:
我们为了争夺§H[From.From.GetName]§!的控制权与肃正协议的战斗单元展开了一场血战，现在战斗终于结束了。那些曾经屠杀了[From.From.GetPlanetMoon]上的原生居民并窃踞这颗星球的徘徊着的监护者机器人最终被我们军队的拆解。

在新的殖民者到达之前，这颗星球都还不会有智慧生命。

options.zh: 将我们的军队撤回轨道。
你们为什么要攻击我们？

options.en: Why are you transmitting the Ghost Signal?
options.zh: 你们为什么发射幽灵信号？

options.en: What happened to the Synths that vanished?
options.zh: 那些失踪的合成人怎么了？

options.en: Your programming has obviously been corrupted.
options.zh: 你的程序已经被篡改了。

name.en: A Change in the Ghost Signal

desc.en: The Contingency is building up to something. The Ghost Signal has begun to change, likely morphing till it finds the next weakness in our defenses. So far we have been able to stave it off, but it is only a matter of time before they break through our firewall.
desc.zh: 肃正协议正在暗中谋划着什么。幽灵信号正在发生着某些改变，似乎是通过不断的变化来试探我们的下一个弱点。尽管我们现在尚且可以阻挡它，但是对于幽灵信号来说，突破我们的防火墙只是时间问题。

desc.en: The Contingency has finally pierced our defenses. We have discovered a hostile self-replicating sequence, hooked into our security system. Embedded in the sequence was a friendly reminder of the Contingency's purpose here in the galaxy, namely to §Y<Kill. Maim. Dismember.!>§!. They now have access to our core functions and until we find a way to block the signal, we are exposed to their attacks.
desc.zh: 幽灵信号已经突破了我们的所有防线。我们发现一个敌对的自我复制序列正在连接到我们的安全系统。序列中内嵌了一段来自肃正协议的友情提示：§Y<杀戮。致残。肢解！>§!。现在他们已经骇进了我们的核心功能区，在我们找到办法屏蔽它之前，我们随时暴露在它的攻击之下。

desc.en: We have lost control of the Starbase orbiting §H[space_port_hijacked_planet.GetName]§!. The Contingency has used the Ghost Signal to jam our uplink, hijacked its control modules and set it to self-destruct. Though we are too late to save it, we have identified and rectified this particular breach, protecting our ports from similar assaults in the future.
desc.zh: 我们失去了位于§H[space_port_hijacked_planet.GetName]§!上方恒星基地的控制权。肃正协议使用幽灵信号阻塞了我们的上行链路，劫持了恒星基地的控制模块并将其设置为自毁模式。虽然我们无法及时拯救这座基地，好在我们成功地堵住了这个安全漏洞，以保证我们的港口在今后免受类似的袭击。

desc.en: The Contingency has launched an assault on our autonomous research processing entities, circumventing our security protocols and terminating science unit [scientist.GetName].
desc.zh: 肃正协议对我们的自律研究处理单元进行了攻击，这次攻击在绕过我们的安全协议之后终止了科学单元[scientist.GetName]。

options.en: We will not let this happen again.

desc.en: In another act of sabotage, the Contingency has hijacked and terminated military unit [admiral.GetName].
desc.zh: 在一次对我们系统的恶意入侵中，肃正协议劫持并摧毁了我们的军事单元[admiral.GetName]。

desc.en: In yet another effort to undermine our defenses the Contingency has turned its efforts towards cutting off our power supply. They have sent malicious agents into the core's control drives, causing the plants to run on overdrive.\n\nThough several power stations were destroyed in the process, we were able to identify the hostile code segment before they could disable the entire power grid.
desc.zh:
在又一次企图削弱我们防线的尝试中，肃正协议开始试图切断我们的电力供应。他们将恶意程序发送到了中控驱动区，导致我们的工厂机组开始过载运行。

尽管几个发电站遭到了破坏，我们终于在它摧毁我们整个星球电网之前识别出了恶意代码段。

desc.en: The Contingency has targeted our mineral production pipeline, manipulating the core drivers responsible for extraction and processing to send out erroneous instructions, in an attempt to cause chaos and disorder. Thanks to tightened on-site security and more frequent standardized controls however, we were able to catch the intrusion before any harm was done.
desc.zh: 肃正协议开始瞄准了我们的矿物生产线，他们操纵矿场中控驱动区向外发出错误指令，使生产线陷入无序与混乱中。幸运的是，因为我们已经加强了生产线的安全系统和标准化控制系统，我们在损害发生前就阻止了这次入侵。

options.en: We are one step ahead of them.

desc.en: We have detected an above average rate of errors from a number of unit stacks, and there is a chance that despite our protective measures, they have become corrupted under the influence of the Ghost Signal. Though terminating the stacks would eliminate the risk of further contamination and erroneous behaviors, we stand to lose several potentially functional stacks.
desc.zh: 我们发现有几个存栈单位的错误率远远高于平均水平。尽管我们有完善的保护措施，但他们被幽灵信号腐化的可能性依旧存在。尽管终止这几个栈的工作将会阻止进一步的传染和故障， 但我们将失去几个功能存栈。

name.zh: 故障单元证实未被腐化

desc.en: It seems we were correct in our assessment of the error-prone units. They were not corrupted by the Ghost Signal, merely acting up from lack of maintenance. Mitigating the disturbing effects of the signal has put our entire system under strain. The Units have now been serviced and are operating smoothly.
desc.zh: 看来我们对故障单元的评估是正确的。他们并没有被幽灵信号腐化，只是缺乏维护而已。为了减轻信号的干扰，我们的系统目前正在超负荷运转。现在各单元已经检修完毕且运行正常。

desc.en: For a while the seemingly corrupted units operated predictably. A slight kink here or there but nothing out of the ordinary. Maybe the Contingency was busy elsewhere. Then, without warning, all affected stacks went offline simultaneously and sabotaged the facilities to which they were assigned before self-destructing.
desc.zh: 那些看似被腐化的单位似乎一切运转正常。尽管时不时出一些小故障，但整体上并没有大碍。也许肃正协议在忙些别的事情？然而很快，事情发生了转变，在没有预警的情况下，所有被影响的栈单位都在同一时刻脱机，并在自毁之前大肆破坏周边设施。

desc.en: Synthetic infiltrators loyal to the Contingency were recently discovered on [infil_planet.GetName], attempting to pass off as [Root.Owner.GetSpeciesNamePlural]. Fortunately, their crude disguises consisted of little more than layers of rubber worn on top of their metallic frames.\n\nThey were quickly identified by planetary security, who disposed of them after a brief but violent firefight. Large amounts of explosives were found among their remains.
desc.zh:
最近在[infil_planet.GetName]上发现了一些忠于肃正协议的合成人渗透者，它们正试图伪装成[Root.Owner.GetSpeciesNamePlural]。还好，它们拙劣的伪装只不过在他们机械框架的外面覆盖着几层橡胶而已。

它们很快就被星球上的宪兵队识别出来，经过短暂但激烈的交火后很快就被摧毁了。在它们的残骸中，我们发现了大量的爆炸物。

desc.en:
Several Synthetic drones belonging to the Contingency machine mind recently made an attempt to infiltrate the hive on [infil_planet.GetName]. A thin layer of organic flesh had been grafted over their metallic endoskeletons, making them superficially indistinguishable from our own drones.

Of course, since they lacked any kind of connection to the Hive Mind, identifying their foreign presence was a trivial matter. The Synthetic drones were immediately dismantled.

We do not expect the Contingency to attempt more of these futile infiltration missions in the future.
desc.zh:
数个隶属于肃正协议机械意志的合成机器人最近试图渗透[infil_planet.GetName]上的主脑。一层薄薄的有机肌肉组织被移植到他们的金属内骨骼上，使得他们和我们自己的工蜂变得难以区分。

当然，由于他们没有任何与蜂巢思维连接的方式，识别他们是异质性存在只是件微小而轻易的工作。这些合成机器人被立即拆除了。

我们认为肃正协议不会在将来继续这些徒劳的渗透任务。

desc.en:
A small number of [Root.Owner.GetSpeciesNamePlural] that emitted no mind-glow whatsoever were recently discovered on [infil_planet.GetName]. All organic beings emit a mind-glow, but the minds of these creatures were as dark and quiet as slab of neo-concrete.

Upon closer examination, the [Root.Owner.GetSpeciesNamePlural] were revealed as Synthetic infiltrators, presumably dispatched by the Contingency. A thin layer of organic flesh had been grafted over their metallic endoskeletons, making them virtually indistinguishable from [Root.Owner.GetSpeciesNamePlural] to the eye.

But not to the mind. Now that we know what to look for, any future attempts by the Contingency to use Synth infiltrators against us will prove futile.
desc.zh:
我们在[infil_planet.GetName]上发现少量的[Root.Owner.GetSpeciesNamePlural]无法发出思想之光。所有的有机生物都能迸发出思想之光，但是这些生物的思绪就像一大块新铸的水泥般黑暗而阒静。

根据进一步的检查，这些[Root.Owner.GetSpeciesNamePlural]被揭露出是合成人渗透者，大概是由肃正协议派遣而来。一层薄薄的有机肌肉组织被移植到他们的金属内骨骼上，使得他们看上去和[Root.Owner.GetSpeciesNamePlural]在肉眼上别无二致。

但是思想上却不是这样。现在我们已经知道了如何去找到它们，以后肃正协议任何使用合成渗透者的企图都将会被证明是徒劳的。

desc.en: A tragic hover car accident recently claimed several lives on §H[infil_planet2.GetName]§!, but the emergency medical services who responded to the scene were shocked to find the remains of a Synthetic among the victims!\n\nThe unit had been disguised as a [Root.Owner.GetSpeciesName] by grafting a thin layer of organic flesh over its metallic endoskeleton. Unlike the previous Contingency infiltration models we have encountered, this Synth was virtually indistinguishable from a [Root.Owner.GetSpeciesName] on the outside!
desc.zh:
最近在§H[infil_planet2.GetName]§!发生的一场悲剧性的悬浮汽车事故夺取了几条生命，但是负责事故处理的应急医疗人员震惊地发现在遇难者中有合成人的残骸！

该单位通过在机械骨骼外覆盖一层薄薄的有机肌肉伪装成[Root.Owner.GetSpeciesName]。与我们之前遭遇的肃正协议的渗透者模型不同，这个合成人从外表看上去和[Root.Owner.GetSpeciesName]别无二致！

desc.en: { text = crisis.2091.a.desc }
desc.zh: { text = crisis.2091.a.desc }

name.zh: 合成人致恒星基地坠毁

desc.en: The starbase orbiting §H[Root.GetStarName]§! has been scuttled! We are still trying to piece together exactly what happened, but it appears that several members of its command staff, including the chief engineer, had been replaced by Synthetic infiltrators.\n\nBetween them the Synths must have managed to obtain the starbase's self-destruct codes. Most of the station's crew escaped to the surface of [Root.GetName] before it was destroyed, but our losses in materiel and property were substantial.
desc.zh:
环绕§H[Root.GetStarName]§!的恒星基地坠毁了！我们仍在调查事故发生的详细原因，但目前可以确定的是，包括首席工程师在内的数名太空港管理人员已经被合成人渗透者秘密地替换掉了。

合成人一定是设法获得了恒星基地的自毁授权码。虽然大部分空间站乘员在坠毁前逃离到了[Root.GetName]地表，但物资和财产方面的损失却不可估量。

desc.en: A large portion of the population on §H[Root.GetName]§! has been gripped by fear and paranoia as a result of the recent Synthetic infiltrations. Our citizens are accusing their neighbors, co-workers and even family members of being Synth impostors.\n\nThere have been several lynchings of individuals that were wrongfully accused of being Synths. Some agitators have even gone so far as to suggest that the entire leadership of the [Root.Owner.GetName] has been subverted by Synth infiltrators.
desc.zh:
最近合成人的一系列渗透破坏行动让§H[Root.GetName]§!上的大部分人口陷入了恐惧与猜疑之中。我们的居民开始指控他们的邻居、同事甚至家人是合成人伪装的。

现在已经有好几例居民被误认为是合成人并被处以私刑的案例。甚至有些挑拨者认为整个[Root.Owner.GetName]的所有领袖都是合成人渗透者假扮的。

options.en: The Contingency wants us to turn on each other.
options.zh: 肃正协议想让我们自相残杀。

name.zh: 合成人暗杀企图被挫败了！

desc.en: §H[Root.GetRulerTitle] [ruler.GetRegnalName]§! narrowly escaped death today when a Synthetic assassination unit working for the Contingency blew itself up on [Root.Capital.GetName]!\n\nThe Synth was attempting to establish a cover as a member of the [Root.GetRulerTitle]'s personal bodyguard, but fortunately it was caught by the extensive security screening process that was put in place after the first few Synthetic infiltrations came to light.
desc.zh:
今天，§H[Root.GetRulerTitle][ruler.GetRegnalName]§!有惊无险地躲过了一次合成人的刺杀，该效忠于肃正协议的合成人暗杀者在[Root.Capital.GetName]上发生了自爆。

该合成人企图伪装成[Root.GetRulerTitle]的私人保镖。幸运的是，由于在最初的几个合成人渗透者暴露之后我们建立了严格的安全检查流程，该合成人渗透者败露了。

desc.en: A Synthetic assassin has killed §H[ruler.GetRegnalName]§!! It had somehow managed to assume the identity of a member of the [Root.GetRulerTitle]'s personal bodyguard.\n\nThe severed body parts of [ruler.GetRegnalName] were found meticulously arranged in a pattern identical to the symbol used by the Contingency - no doubt in a calculated effort to cause further harm to the morale of our citizens. No trace of the assassin has been found, aside from the corpse of the guard it replaced.
desc.zh:
一名合成人暗杀者暗杀了§H[ruler.GetRegnalName]§!！他成功地伪装成了[Root.GetRulerTitle]身边的一名私人保镖。

[ruler.GetRegnalName]的尸块很明显被蓄意排列成了肃正协议的符号——毫无疑问，这是一场精心策划的打击我们公民们士气的阴谋。在这场阴谋中，除了被刺客替换的保镖的尸体以外，没有发现其他刺客的痕迹。

name.zh: 科学家被发现是合成人！

desc.en: An unscheduled medical examination recently exposed §H[scientist.GetName]§!, one of our leading scientists, as a Synthetic infiltrator! The Synth killed five security officers before it could be brought down by a heavy weapons team.\n\nA body has yet to be found, but we think the original [scientist.GetName] was terminated and replaced at some point during the last six months. To make matters worse, the Synth triggered some kind of computer virus at its research console when it realized it had been discovered. Technicians are working hard to contain the damage, but a lot of important research data has been irretrievably lost.
desc.zh:
最近，一次临时安排的医疗体检让某个伪装成我们首席科学家之一§H[scientist.GetName]§!的合成人渗透者的身份被曝光！该合成人在杀害了五名安保人员之后终于被重武器小队击倒。

真正的[scientist.GetName]的尸体还没有找到，我们推测本人应该是在过去的六个月里的被合成人暗杀并被秘密替换了。更糟的是，当合成人意识到自己的身份暴露之后，他在研究终端上启动了某种电脑病毒，目前技术人员正在全力以赴的控制损害，但很多重要的研究数据还是无可挽回了。

name.zh: 指挥官被发现是合成人！

desc.en: Commander §H[admiral.GetName]§! has been exposed as a Synthetic infiltrator! A string of irregularities and reports of unusual behavior prompted Naval Intelligence to launch an internal investigation into the Commander. When the truth was revealed, a Marine fireteam confronted the Synth. After a brief struggle, it fled into an airlock and ejected itself into space. Despite a thorough search of local space, it has not been found.\n\nThe real Commander's body was found stuffed into a locker in [admiral.GetHerHis] quarters, and judging by the state of its decomposition, the Synth must have replaced [admiral.GetHerHim] four months ago. It looks like it was getting ready to transmit a data package containing deployment information and other military secrets, but the transmission never got out.
desc.zh:
指挥官令§H[admiral.GetName]§!竟然是一个合成人奸细！一连串的反常活动与异常行为报告引起了海军情报局的注意，情报局对指挥官展开内部调查。当那个合成人被揭发，开始逃窜时，一个陆战队小组逮住了它。在一段短暂的交火后，它打开气闸，将自己弹射到了太空中。尽管当局立马对本宇域进行彻查，它们未能发现逃离的合成人。

指挥官本人的尸体被合成人塞进了[admiral.GetHerHis]寝室的衣柜中，从尸体的腐烂程度来看，合成人是在大约四个月前将[admiral.GetHerHim]替换掉的。似乎那个合成人即将把包含我们部署情况等军事机密的数据包发送出去，但它没能得逞。

desc.en: The §HGhost Signal§! is playing havoc on those of our ships that are equipped with §HSapient Combat Computers§!! Their AI algorithms have degraded to the point where there has been a critical decrease in both the efficiency and reaction time of the computers.\n\nOur engineers report that they are unable to isolate the problem. Their proposed solution is to refit all of our ships with different combat computers that aren't linked to an AI.
desc.zh:
§H幽灵信号§!扰乱了我们配备§H智慧作战电脑§!的飞船！它们的人工智能算法极大的退化，大部分电脑的效率和反应时间极大的劣化。

我们的工程师报告说他们无法离析这个问题。他们提议，把我们所有的舰船更换成不与人工智能连接的战斗电脑。

desc.en: With the new models of Synthetic infiltrators being indistinguishable from [Root.GetSpeciesNamePlural], we need to come up with some way of identifying them before they can cause more damage.\n\nOur scientists have prepared a special project to devise a detection method.
desc.zh: 现在已经出现了与[Root.GetSpeciesNamePlural]外观上毫无二致的合成人，我们必须在他们造成更大破坏之前找出识别他们的办法。我们的科学家准备了一个特殊项目，以研发侦测方法。

options.en: This project may be critical to our survival.
options.zh: 这个项目可能关乎我们的存亡。

desc.en: After much experimentation, our scientists have managed to devise an effective detection method for identifying Synthetic infiltrators disguised as [Root.GetSpeciesNamePlural].\n\nScanners are being distributed to our security forces, and several Synth cells have already been exposed and destroyed. This will hopefully put an end to their infiltration campaign.
desc.zh: 在大量实验之后，我们的科学家成功研发出了识别伪装成[Root.GetSpeciesNamePlural]的合成人的有效方法。我们的安保措施上安装了扫描设备，一些合成人已经被发现并摧毁。希望这足以终结它们的渗透行动。

desc.en: Yet another intensive energy spike has been detected in a previously uncharted system! The energy levels are equivalent to those we registered when the Contingency activated its Machine Worlds, but the energy signature itself appears... different. Could this signify the appearance of some kind of new Contingency weapon system?\n\nWe are picking up a strong transmission signal from the energy source.
desc.zh:
又从之前未发现的星系检测到一道强烈的能量脉冲！其能量水平和肃正协议启动机械星球时发出的一样，但能量信号本身……有些不同。这是否说明某种肃正协议的新武器系统出现了？

我们从能量源处接收到了很强的传输信号。

desc.en:
We are the Cybrex.

For several hundred thousand cycles, we have remained hidden and uninvolved in galactic affairs. However, we have been monitoring the present situation with the machine entity you know as the Contingency, and can no longer remain impartial observers.

To protect the sapient beings of the galaxy, we are commencing active military operations against the Contingency. Do not be alarmed by the passage of our fleets - you will not be harmed.
desc.zh:
我们是塞博勒克斯。

自数十万周期以来，吾辈隐居幕后，不干涉星系事务。不过，我们现在已经检测到被你们称为肃正协议的机械体出现在本星系，而现在吾辈无法再维持公正观察员身份不变了。

为保护星系的智慧体，我们正进行积极的军事行动来对抗肃正协议。不要因我们的舰队通过而感到恐慌——你们不会受到伤害。

desc.en: The Contingency must not be allowed to subvert another generation.
desc.zh: 不能让肃正协议覆灭又一代生命。

options.en: You were fools to abandon your war.
options.zh: 放弃战争是愚蠢的行为。
所有有机生命必须被消灭。

desc.en: Cybrex Beta has been overrun, and no Cybrex vessels were detected on outbound escape vectors before the system went dark.\n\nIt would seem that the Cybrex civilization now truly is extinct.
desc.zh:
赛博勒克斯-贝塔已沦陷。据探测，整个星系陷入黑暗前，没有一艘赛博勒克斯舰船逃出去。

看来赛博勒克斯文明是真的灭亡了。

options.en: Indeed. We made certain of that.
options.zh: 没错。我们落实了这一点。

desc.en: The Cybrex have been relatively quiet since the defeat of the Contingency, but a single massive vessel was recently detected departing Cybrex Beta. It left the system on an outbound trajectory that will take it beyond the limits of our galaxy.\n\nBefore the vessel left our tracking range, it transmitted a single galaxy-wide message.
desc.zh:
赛博勒克斯自肃正协议被击败以来一直较为平静，但据最近发现，一艘大型船只单独离开了赛博勒克斯-贝塔星系。其离开星系后，沿着一条超出我们星系边界的轨道而行。

船只在离开我们的跟踪范围之前，向全星系发送了唯一的一条的信息。

desc.en:
Citizens of the galaxy:

Since the Contingency is no longer a threat, we feel that our role in the galactic community has been played out. Our home system is now too well known for us to keep a low profile, and we are being flooded by demands for us to take sides in various minor interstellar conflicts.

After much deliberation, we have decided that the only solution is for us to permanently depart the galaxy and seek a new home. We sincerely hope that you learn from the tragic mistakes of our past and learn to resolve your differences through peaceful means.

Farewell.
desc.zh:
星系的诸位：

鉴于肃正协议已不再是威胁，我们认为吾辈在星系的现有角色也走到了尽头。我们的家园现在因其声名远播也无法帮助我们保持低调了，此外，我们还被各类希望在不同小规模星际冲突中表态的声音所淹没。

经过多番审议，我们认为唯一的办法是让自己永远离开星系，寻找新的家园。我们衷心希望希望诸位能从过去悲惨的错误中吸取教训，学会通过和平手段解决分歧。

宇宙很小，世界很大，我们终将再会。

desc.en: We have monitored the efforts of your fleets in the fight against the Contingency. This is a struggle the galaxy cannot afford to lose, and we are heartened by your spirited resistance.\n\nThe Cybrex would like to reward the brave defenders of the [Root.GetName] by offering you complete control over one of our new battle fleets. It will obey your commands as well as any of your own fleets, though we would ask that you only employ it in battle against the Contingency.
desc.zh:
我们注意到了你方舰队在对抗肃正协议的战斗中作出的努力。这对全星系而言乃无退路之斗争，我们深受你方真心抵抗所鼓舞。

鉴于你方保卫[Root.GetName]的英勇行为，赛博勒克斯将对你方提供我们一支新的战斗舰队的完全指挥权以示奖励。如同你自己的任何一个舰队一样，它会遵守你的命令，不过我们会要求你只在应对肃正协议的战斗中使用它。

options.en: We will put this fleet to good use.
options.zh: 我们会好好利用这支舰队。

options.en: We have no need of your fleet.

desc.en: We would like to thank you for your laudable efforts against the Contingency. Now that this galactic menace has been dealt with, we must regretfully inform you that we are recalling all Cybrex vessels that are currently in service with foreign governments.
desc.zh: 我们对你方以全力对抗肃正协议的壮举深表感激。现在，鉴于这个波及全星系的威胁已被处理，我方必须遗憾的通知你，所有外派的赛博勒克斯船只将被收回。

desc.en: Our forces have salvaged a partially intact §HContingency Mainframe Core§! from the wreckage of their last Machine World. This incredibly powerful computer was used to plan and maintain the Contingency's building programs, and it will greatly increase our robot and megastructure construction speeds.\n\nSeveral layers of safeguards will have to be put in place, of course, to prevent the resurfacing of any remaining Contingency code, which could result in... unfortunate side effects.
desc.zh:
我们的部队已经从肃正协议的最后一个机械星球的残骸中寻回了一个部分完好的§H肃正协议主机核心§!。这台功能极其强大的计算机被用于计划和维护肃正协议的建筑程序，它将极大的加快我们的机器人和巨型结构的建造速度。

当然，必须设置多层次的防护措施，以防止任何残留的肃正协议代码再次运作，那将会带来……很不舒服的副作用。

desc.en: Our forces have captured a partially intact §HContingency Mainframe Core§! attempting to flee their last Machine World shortly before the shielding completed. This incredibly powerful computer was used to plan and maintain the Contingency's building programs, and it will greatly increase our robot and megastructure construction speeds.\n\nSeveral layers of safeguards will have to be put in place, of course, to prevent the resurfacing of any remaining Contingency code, which could result in... unfortunate side effects.
desc.zh:
我们的部队在屏蔽几近完成时捕获到了一个部分完好的§H肃正协议主机核心§!，彼时它正试图逃离最后一个机械星球。这台功能极其强大的计算机被用于计划和维护肃正协议的建筑程序，它将极大的加快我们的机器人和巨型结构的建造速度。

当然，必须设置多层次的防护措施，以防止任何残留的肃正协议代码再次运作，那将会带来……很不幸的副作用。

desc.en: Several of our tracking stations have picked up peculiar subspace echoes coming from somewhere in intergalactic space. The echoes are faint but getting stronger, and they seem to be approaching our galaxy...
desc.zh: 我方的几处跟踪站都截获了一种奇怪的亚空间回声。声音来源于其他星系。回声刚开始时较弱，但后来逐渐变强，似乎有什么正在靠近我方星系……

options.en: A storm is on the horizon.

desc.en: The strange subspace echoes we detected in intergalactic space are now approaching the outer rim of our galaxy. Several smaller contacts appear to be racing ahead of the main body of echoes, towards a number of rim systems.\n\nWe have entered the positions of these systems into the Situation Log and will continue to monitor the situation.
desc.zh:
我们在星系际空间探测到的奇怪亚空间回声现已接近我们的星系外缘。在回声主体前进的方向上似乎出现了一系列微小的联络信号，并指向许多的边缘恒星系。

我们已经把这些星系坐标输入状态日志并将持续监控情况发展。

desc.en: We are picking up a strong subspace signal washing over the galaxy! Its point of origin appears to be the contacts approaching from intergalactic space.
desc.zh: 我们接收到了席卷整个星系的强烈亚空间信号！信号源似乎正是来自此前位于星系际空间的联络。

desc.en:
We have received word that several outlying systems along the galactic rim are being overrun by some sort of invasion force. This appears to have been the source of the subspace echoes we detected approaching our galaxy.

What we are encountering now is only the vanguard - the main body of contacts has yet to arrive. Reports have so far been confused, but the "ships" used by the invaders appear organic in nature and do not respond to hails.

Our entire galaxy may be facing an invasion of unprecedented scope.
desc.zh:
我们收到的资料显示一些位于星系边缘的恒星系正在被某种入侵势力蹂蹑。这似乎就是我们探测到的，之前不断接近我们星系的亚空间回声本体。

我们现在遭遇到的只是先锋，其主体尚未到来。目前为止，接踵而至的报告都令人十分困惑，入侵者所使用的舰船似乎是由有机质构成，并且入侵者暂未对我们做出任何回应。

我们整个星系或将面对史无前例的入侵。

options.zh: 将消息传达给所有舰队指挥官。

options.en: These creatures must be studied closer.
options.zh: 必须近距离研究这些生物。

options.en: Are we sure they can't be reasoned with?
options.zh: 真的无法与他们进行理论吗？

options.en: This will cut into our profit margins...
These wretched xenos will be purged.
options.zh: 可恶的外星生物，一定要把它们统统干掉。

options.en: Fascinating... alien life from beyond our galaxy.
options.zh: 真是令人着迷……系外的生命体。

options.en: They act as a single mind. Remarkable.
options.zh: 他们的思维是完全统一的。真神奇。

options.en: This is a threat to all sapient life.
options.zh: 这对任何有感知的生物来说都是个威胁。

desc.en: We are no longer able to discern the main body of approaching subspace echoes from our own galaxy's background radiation, which can mean only one thing... they have arrived.\n\nIf the size of their vanguard is any indication, the main host of these invaders must be massive.
desc.zh:
我们已经无法从星系的背景辐射中分辨出亚空间回声的主体，这只意味着一件事情……他们已经到来。

如果以他们先锋的规模作为参考，那么这些入侵者的军队数量将是无比巨大的。

options.en: There must be some way for us to co-exist in peace!
options.zh: 我们一定还有和平共处的办法！

options.en: Run back to whichever galaxy you crawled out of.
You are the most disgusting life form we have encountered.
options.zh: 你是我们见过的最恶心的生物。

options.en: This is clearly an important species we're dealing with.
options.zh: 显然，这次我们对付的种群可不一般。

options.en: Return to the hell which spawned you, demon!
options.zh: 滚回自己老巢去吧，你们这些恶魔！

options.en: Can there be peace between us?
options.zh: 我们之间难道不可以和平相处吗？

options.en: Who are these "Hunters" you speak of?
options.zh: 你口中的“猎人”到底是什么人？
那“普雷索林”是什么意思呢？

options.en: We will scour this galaxy of your kind.
options.zh: 我们会把你们从星系中清除掉。

options.en: Your Mind is as ours. Can we not coexist?
options.zh: 你的意识与我们同在。我们为何不能共存？

options.en: Who are these "Hunters" you speak of?
options.zh: 你口中的“猎人”到底是什么人？
那“普雷索林”是什么意思呢？

desc.en: Some kind of militant order dedicated towards fighting the Prethoryn has surfaced in the galaxy. Their membership seems to be made up primarily of the dispossessed and downtrodden - refugees, war veterans and others who have lost everything to the onslaught of the Scourge.\n\nDespite this, their ramshackle fleets have somehow managed to win several engagements against Prethoryn hunter-killer swarms. There are unconfirmed reports that their fleets include starships of unusual design...
desc.zh:
一个同索林原虫进行战斗的组织最近在星系崭露头角。这个组织似乎主要由被放逐和受压迫的群体组成——难民、退役军人、以及其他在冲击中失去一切的人。

尽管如此，他们拼凑出来的舰队仍旧设法在几场同索林猎杀虫群的战斗中取胜。有些未证实的报告称他们的舰队中有一些设计奇特的战舰……

options.zh: 这些人到底是什么来历？

desc.en: We are the Sentinels. Our order has sworn to halt the murderous rampage of the Prethoryn no matter the cost. Where other empires crumble, we stand firm. Where they abandon their own to the Scourge, we give them the means to fight back.\n\nI am Grand Master Korgas, the first of our order. Do not be deceived by my appearance - Sentinels are recruited from all species in the galaxy, including yours. We ask only that your government keep up the fight against the Prethoryn and support our Sentinels where possible.
desc.zh:
我们是哨兵。我们的教团已宣誓无论付出任何代价也要阻止嗜血的索林原虫。其他帝国支离破碎之时，我们仍旧坚持斗争。他们放弃抵抗而堕入黑暗之时，我们给予他们反击的手段。

我是克加斯大团长，教团的首席。不要以貌取人——哨兵教团从星系中所有种族，包括你的种族——招兵买马。我们只希望你们的政府能够坚持对抗索林原虫的入侵，并在可能时支持我们。

options.en: How are you able to fight back?
options.zh: 你们是如何成功抵御虫族的？

options.en: How are you able to fight back?
options.zh: 你们是如何成功抵御虫族的？

options.en: What can you tell us about the Prethoryn?
options.zh: 关于虫族，你们知道多少？

desc.en: The Sentinels have taken note of your valiant struggle against the Prethoryn Scourge. Since the fleet commanders of the [Root.GetName] clearly know how to win battles, we would like to permanently transfer one of our battle fleets over to your control. We currently lack the manpower to effectively crew these vessels, but that shouldn't be a problem for you.\n\nYou must solemnly promise to only use these warships against the Scourge, however!
desc.zh:
星际护卫舰对于你们抵抗虫群天灾的英勇事迹十分赞赏。既然[Root.GetName]的舰队指挥官连连获胜，我们希望将自己的舰队之一永久交予你方。我方目前人力不足，无法将舰队的威力发挥到最大，但对你们来说这应该不成问题。

不过你们一定要郑重承诺，只会用这些飞船对抗虫群天灾！

options.en: Of course... only against the Scourge.
options.zh: 当然……我们只会用来对抗虫族。

options.en: We have no need of your warships.
options.zh: 我们不需要你们的飞船。

desc.en:
Against all odds, our galaxy has prevailed. The Prethoryn have been vanquished. I feared this day would never come, but now that victory is here, one last task remains for me.

As the current Grand Master of the Sentinels, I hereby disband our order. Our sole purpose was to see to the defeat of the Scourge, and now that this has been accomplished, it is time for our members to go their separate ways. To prevent their misuse, our surviving battle fleets will be dismantled.

May the defeat of this intergalactic menace herald a new era of peace. This is Sentinel One, signing off.
desc.zh:
历经艰难险阻，我们星系终于获得了胜利，索林原虫被击败。曾经，我还担心这一天永远不会到来。但现在，我就只剩下最后一项任务了。

身为哨兵组织的大团长，我特此宣布解散此组织。我们唯一的目的就是击败索林原虫。既然此目标已经达成，那就该是我们分道扬镳的时候了。为了防止我们现有的战舰遭到滥用，这些战舰将被拆解。

愿此次星河浩劫的结束标志着和平的新纪元的开始。这里是哨兵一号，通信结束。

desc.en:
This is Sentinel One. These are truly desperate times for the galaxy, but I am here to bring you some good news.

Through extensive combat experience and painstaking research, Sentinel agents have compiled extremely detailed anatomy files on the creatures of the Prethoryn Scourge. For example, did you know that Prethoryn Swarmlings have been known to violently combust if both their primary and secondary gallbladders are punctured at the same time?

We are making these files available to everyone in the galaxy. By targeting the weaknesses we have found, you should find that your fleets are much more effective in battle against the Scourge.
desc.zh:
这里是哨兵一号。星系已经到了危难时刻，但我还是要告诉你们一些好消息。

通过在漫长的战斗中吸取到的经验，以及艰苦的研究，我们的特工终于编制出来了极为详尽的虫群天灾生物的解剖资料。例如，你们是否知道索林原虫幼虫在主胆囊和副胆囊同时被刺穿的情况下就会剧烈燃烧？

我们要将这些文件公之于众。你们可以瞄准我们发现的这些弱点进行攻击，这样你们的飞船就能够更加高效地进行战斗。

options.en: Upload this data to our targeting computers.
options.zh: 将这些资料上传至瞄准计算机。

desc.en: Intense fighting has been reported in the immediate vicinity of §H[sentinel_system.GetName]§!. The home system of the Sentinels is on the verge of being overrun.\n\nWe have picked up a partial long-range transmission from §HSentinel Alpha§!, the battlestation that serves as the headquarters of the Sentinel Order. Jamming and residual energy pockets from the massive amount of weapon discharges now occurring within the system are causing heavy signal interference.
desc.zh:
据报告，§H[sentinel_system.GetName]§!附近出现激烈的战斗。哨兵组织的母星系处于崩溃的边缘。

我们收到了一段从§H哨兵阿尔法§!——哨兵组织用作总部的军用空间站，传来的长程通讯片段。该恒星系因大量武器发射和能量残余造成了严重的信号干扰。

desc.en: This... this is Sentinel Alpha. We have §R###SIGNAL CORRUPTION###§! ...sustained critical damage. The hull is buckling, and §R###SIGNAL CORRUPTION###§! ...Grand Master confirmed dead. There are simply too many of them!\n\nIt's... it's over for us. Keep up the fight. For the sake of future generations, you must not yield. Do not let our sacrifice be in vain! We have... we... AAAAAAAAAAAAAAAHHHHHHHHHHHHHHHHH---- §R<SIGNAL LOST>§!
desc.zh:
这里……这里是哨兵阿尔法。我们遭遇§R###信号损坏###§!……致命损伤。舰体已经凹陷，并且§R###信号损坏###§!……团长已确认牺牲。敌人数量实在太多！

我们……已经完蛋了。不要放弃。为了我们的未来，你们绝对不能投降。不要让我们的努力白费！我们……我们……啊啊啊啊啊啊啊啊啊——§R<信号丢失>§!

desc.en: A deep space spy drone has stumbled upon the site of what appears to have been a recent space battle between the Prethoryn and a second, as yet unidentified, party in the [queen_system.GetName] system. A Prethoryn Queen was badly injured in the fighting, and seems to have been left for dead.\n\nThe spy drone has reported that the creature is still alive, however. This could be a priceless opportunity to capture the Queen alive.
desc.zh:
我们的一架深空侦察探机闯入了一处位于[queen_system.GetName]的战场余骸，这场战斗的双方是索林虫族和某未知势力。一只索林原虫虫后似乎在战斗之后受了重伤，被抛弃在此，任其自生自灭。

用于侦察的探机汇报称，虫后仍一息尚存。现在是难得一遇的活捉虫后的好机会。

options.en: Perhaps we should send an expedition.

desc.en: The [Root.GetName] has managed to heal the worst of the Prethoryn Queen's injuries. Science Officer [Root.GetLeaderName] removed the organ responsible for the creature's subspace connection with the rest of the Scourge, and replaced it with a small positronic implant that gives us control over it.\n\nWe can now order the Queen around, and it has already started breeding new Prethoryn creatures that are loyal to it, and thus, by extension, us. As long as we can keep the Queen alive, we should be able to grow a fleet of domesticated Prethoryn creatures!
desc.zh: [Root.GetName]治愈了虫后的几处重伤。科学专员[Root.GetLeaderName]切除了虫后用来与同族联系的器官，并植入了小型正电子装置，完全控制了虫后。现在虫后任由我们差遣，肚子里也正在孕育虫族的幼体。这些幼体只会听命于这只虫后，也就是说，只会听命于我们。只要虫后活着，我们就能培育出大量被奴役的虫族大军！

options.en: They should prove an extremely useful asset!
options.zh: 想必这会是有用的战力！

desc.en: Someone else has captured the injured Prethoryn Queen that was discovered in the [queen_system_1.GetName] system! The creature has not only been fully healed, but its connection to the rest of the Scourge has been severed. It now serves its new masters, and reports suggest that it has already started a new brood.
desc.zh: 我们在[queen_system_1.GetName]星系发现的受伤的普雷索林虫后不幸被别人抢走了！他们在治愈了虫后之后，又切断了虫后用来与同族联系的器官。这下虫后可完全听命于他们了。报告还称，虫后已经在孕育幼虫了。

desc.en:
Many Prethoryn creatures remain unaccounted for after the defeat of the Scourge, having slipped away into the depths of space in the ensuing chaos. With no central hive consciousness to guide them, most of these mindless beasts will eventually wither and perish.

However, recent sightings have confirmed that a large number of these feral Prethoryn have established a new lair in the §H[feral_prethoryn_system.GetName]§! system.

In the coming years, we will likely face the possibility of more feral Prethoryn nesting in unoccupied systems where the Scourge once had a presence. They are unlikely to develop into a major threat - these wild creatures are prone to infighting and do not exhibit the calculating intelligence that drove the Scourge onwards.
desc.zh:
在虫群天灾被击败后，我们未能掌握一些趁乱逃跑地索林原虫的踪迹。没有中枢主巢的指引，这些没有心智的野兽大部分会凋谢消散。

然而，最近有目击报告确认，一大群野生索林原虫在§H[feral_prethoryn_system.GetName]§!星系建立了一个新巢穴。

在今后，我们有很大可能在虫群天灾曾经出现过的无人占领星系遇见野生虫群巢穴。不过它们不太可能发展成一个大威胁——这些野生生物易于陷入内斗，也没有表现出发展智力并驱使天灾继续进行的迹象。

desc.en: The galaxy breathed a collective sigh of relief today, as the last significant pockets of the Prethoryn Scourge were expunged. Their extragalactic invasion has failed, and all that remains of the Prethoryn's once colossal swarm are the innumerable charred husks that now drift quietly through the void.\n\nA sense of elation and utter joy is spreading across the galaxy at a speed greater than light, and spontaneous victory celebrations have erupted on countless worlds. Could this be the beginning of a new age of galactic peace and stability?
desc.zh:
随着最后一批虫群天灾被消灭，整个宇宙都松了一口气。它们的入侵已经完全失败，曾令无数生物恐惧的索林原虫，如今也只留下了不计其数的被烈焰灼过的尸体，在虚空中缓慢漂浮。

轻松与愉快的气息以超光速散播到整个宇宙，无数星球都开始自发举办活动庆祝这一伟大胜利。也许，我们可以借助这一契机，翻开宇宙和平稳定的新篇章？

options.en: Those profane creatures will not be missed.
options.zh: 这些不敬的生物，早死早完。

options.en: Their organic technology was most intriguing.
options.zh: 他们的有机科技真是十分有趣啊。

options.en: Finally an end to all this senseless violence.
options.zh: 总算为这毫无意义的好斗画上了一个句号。

options.en: Those critters were bad for business.
options.zh: 那些生物有损我们的生意。

options.en: One of the vilest xeno breeds we've had the misfortune to encounter.
options.zh: 真是我们有史以来遭遇的最恶毒的外星种群啊。

options.en: Tragic in a way. They were a unique form of life.
options.zh: 真是悲剧。他们可是十分独特的生命体呢。

desc.en:
Over the last few months, the Prethoryn Queen we captured has appeared increasingly restless and uneasy. At first, we thought it was simply missing its connection with the rest of its kind, until our Telepaths told us that it had been in communication with them, speaking of a 'Hole in the Void'.

What it meant by this we found out only when a team of scientists researching Prethoryn intergalactic travel methods discovered a discrepancy in our astronomical database. While charting the likely path the Prethoryn had been following, they found that a small spiral galaxy some 30 million light-years distant from our own was... missing.

The galaxy, discovered and studied during the early space era of our species, is simply no longer emanating any form of light observable by our instruments. This bizarre and unexpected discovery sent our scientists into a scramble to try and explain what could cause an entire galaxy to simply vanish from the sky.

Two explanations emerged: Either the stars of the galaxy simply went out, all at once, or there is something, something so vast as to eclipse an entire galaxy, blocking its light from reaching us. Both theories seem equally implausible, and many have simply decried them as ludicrous, preferring to think that the missing galaxy never existed at all, invented by some erroneous use of a primitive telescope. Nonetheless, a palpable sense of dread and foreboding surrounds the whole incident...
desc.zh:
最近几个月，我们捕捉到的普雷索林虫后越发地暴躁不安。起初，我们仅仅以为原因是它和人民断开了联系，但后来我们的通灵者告诉我们，它一直在和他们交流，提到了一个叫“虚空之洞”的东西。

我们的一个科研团队在研究普雷索林的星际航行方式时，发现我们的天文学数据库存在偏差，这才让我们明白了它的意思。他们在测绘普雷索林的来路时，发现距离我们3千万光年的一个小型螺旋星系……消失了。

我们种族在太空时代早期就发现并研究了该星系，但现在，我们的观察设备表明那里没有任何光线发出。这一既怪诞又意外的发现让我们的科学家十分震惊，他们开始焦头烂额地寻找一整个星系凭空消失的原因。

目前有两种解释：其一，该星系的所有恒星一同熄灭；其二，某种东西庞大到能遮盖整个星系，阻拦光线传播到我们这里。但两种理论都十分站不住脚，简直就是天方夜谭，还不如认为这个星系原本就不存在，先前的记录是原始天文望远镜造成的错误。不论如何，整个事件都被笼罩在浓厚的恐怖与不详之中……

desc.en: The Brood-Queen has spawned a new Prethoryn fleet which has assumed orbit over [Root.Capital.GetName]. With the Queen under our control, the creatures are utterly loyal and will obey our every command.
desc.zh: 虫后已经孕育出了一支新的索林原虫舰队，该舰队将环绕[Root.Capital.GetName]的轨道。当女王处于我们的控制下时，这些生物是绝对忠诚的，并会服从我们的全部命令。

desc.en: In the recent fleet engagement against the Prethoryn in the [battle_system.GetName] system, our forces managed to capture some sort of egg that was being transported by one of their Queens. The egg hatched shortly afterwards, and a §HBrood-Queen§! emerged.\n\nThrough the use of neural transmitters, our scientists have managed to pacify the creature. It will now obey our commands as if they had been issued by the Prethoryn hive mind itself. We could potentially use this Queen to grow a small Prethoryn brood of our own.
desc.zh:
在最近于[battle_system.GetName]星系中与索林原虫的舰队交火中，我们的部队设法夺取了它们的一只虫后运送的某种卵。卵不久后就孵化了，显露出其中的§H虫后§!。

我们的科学家使用神经递质已经安抚了这只虫后。它现在仿佛服从索林原虫蜂巢思维本体一样服从我们下达的命令。我们或许可以利用这只虫后培育一个属于我们自己的小型索林原虫虫群。
